LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Advisor.description: After many years of devoted service in the Brotherhood, [PAWN_nameDef] became part of the inner circle of [PAWN_possessive] chapter. [PAWN_pronoun] quickly became a trusted advisor for the Elder, whose opinion was highly sought after. Many of [PAWN_possessive] brothers and sisters believed, that [PAWN_pronoun] would one day become the new Elder.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Advisor.title: BoS Advisor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_a.description: Raised within the fortified halls of a Brotherhood bunker, [PAWN_nameDef] was expected to follow [PAWN_possessive] parents into the Scribes, dedicating a life to maintaining technology. But [PAWN_pronoun] longed for the battlefield, inspired by stories of Paladins reclaiming lost knowledge from the wasteland. Defying expectations, [PAWN_pronoun] fought to join the initiates, proving [PAWN_possessive] worth through relentless training and a hunger for fieldwork. While [PAWN_possessive] technical knowledge remains sharp, [PAWN_pronoun] now seeks to earn a place among the Brotherhood’s elite warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_a.title: Brotherhood Aspirant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_b.description: Born in the unforgiving wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up scavenging ruins and avoiding raider gangs. When a Brotherhood patrol found [PAWN_pronoun] fending off a group of feral ghouls with nothing but a rusted pistol, they saw potential. Given the choice between enlistment or exile, [PAWN_pronoun] embraced the Brotherhood’s ideals, eager to trade a life of survival for one of purpose. Now, as an aspirant, [PAWN_pronoun] trains to uphold the Brotherhood’s doctrine and earn the right to wear power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_b.title: Brotherhood Aspirant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_c.description: From an early age, [PAWN_nameDef] was immersed in the Brotherhood’s teachings not just in battle, but in the knowledge that technology must be preserved at all costs. Unlike the wastelanders who fumbled with old world machines, [PAWN_possessive] lessons came from preserved databanks and the Brotherhood’s most skilled Scribes. Though [PAWN_pronoun] has trained in combat like all Brotherhood recruits, [PAWN_possessive] true passion lies in deciphering ancient schematics and uncovering lost technology. But in a world where knowledge alone won’t keep [PAWN_pronoun] alive, [PAWN_pronoun] is determined to prove [PAWN_possessive] worth as a warrior and a scholar.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_c.title: Brotherhood Aspirant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_d.description: Unlike most aspirants, [PAWN_nameDef] wasn’t drawn to war, but to the machines that powered it. From childhood, [PAWN_possessive] days were spent studying fusion cores, repairing damaged laser rifles, and testing salvaged pre-war technology. While the Brotherhood needed warriors, it also needed minds capable of keeping their advanced arsenal operational. Though [PAWN_pronoun] trained in combat like all aspirants, [PAWN_pronoun] finds just as much satisfaction in the hum of a properly calibrated laser as [PAWN_pronoun] does in the heat of battle.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspirant_d.title: Brotherhood Aspirant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspiring_Knight.descri: Since the day [PAWN_pronoun] could walk, [PAWN_nameDef] wanted to become a Paladin and earn the privilege of wearing one of the Brotherhood’s finest power-armour. However, the road to this goal proved to be long and difficult and so [PAWN_nameDef] trained even harder than the other squires.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Aspiring_Knight.title: Aspiring Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Born_Leader.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was always in charge of [PAWN_possessive] clique. [PAWN_possessive] peers looked up to [PAWN_objective] not because of sheer brawn, but because of [PAWN_possessive] wisdom and natural charisma. Many knights and paladins saw these as the qualities of a future elder.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Born_Leader.title: Born Leader
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Born_Wastelander.descr: [PAWN_nameDef]’s parents joined the Brotherhood after [PAWN_pronoun] was born, bringing their child into the group. [PAWN_nameDef] tried [PAWN_possessive] best to get along with the other squires, but never managed to be wholly accepted as one of their own.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Born_Wastelander.title: Born Wastelander
Born Wastelander
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Cleanser.d: The wasteland was full of Super Mutants, Ghouls and other abominations the Brotherhood sought to purge. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a team deployed to cleanse the wasteland of the radiated horrors. [PAWN_pronoun] was an expert fighter, never losing [PAWN_possessive] nerve in battle. After years of fighting the vilest creatures the wasteland spat out, [PAWN_nameDef] developed an almost religious zealotry which separated [PAWN_objective] from the more pragmatic members of the Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Educator.d: The Brotherhood of Steel had a long and proud history and [PAWN_nameDef] was honoured to teach the squires about it. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a strict teacher, [PAWN_pronoun] was still beloved by [PAWN_possessive] pupils and respected by the adult members of [PAWN_possessive] chapter for [PAWN_possessive] extensive knowledge of the past.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Loner.desc: The strict military lifestyle of the Brotherhood was not for everyone. [PAWN_nameDef] had trouble adapting to the stringent, regulated routine within the organisation. [PAWN_pronoun] longed for freedom, creative activities, and self-actualization.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Preservati: [PAWN_nameDef] was member of the BOS, who adhered to the preservationist ideology. The preservationists were often seen as followers of a more idealistic vision for the Brotherhood of Steel. While they still thought that they’re main goal was to reclaim lost technology, they often tried to help people outside of the Brotherhood too, since they thought of themselves as guardians and protectors of the whole of humanity.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Quartermas: The Brotherhood wouldn’t be the Brotherhood without their heavy suits of power armour and laser weapons. [PAWN_nameDef] was a quartermaster for [PAWN_possessive] chapter and fulfilled this duty with great pride. While all soldiers of the BOS were expected to look after their own gear, [PAWN_nameDef] was the person they went to as soon as their equipment’s damages exceeded their own repairing capabilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Reactionar: [PAWN_nameDef] was member of the BOS, who adhered to the reactionary ideology. The reactionaries were the most inward oriented group within the Brotherhood. They usually didn’t care much about the common wastelanders, as long as they didn’t get in their way. In their mind, the Brotherhood was the only group who should be allowed to possess pre-war military technology. They didn’t shy away from going to war with other groups, if they refused to give up what the Brotherhood desired.
The main purpose of the Brotherhood of Steel was the reclaiming of lost technologies from the old world. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a team of Brotherhood soldiers tasked with reclaiming caches of technology from pre-war buildings. It was an extremely dangerous task, since most structurally intact ruins were infested by ghouls, mutants, raiders and other vermin.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Restorer.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was member of the BOS, who adhered to the restorer ideology. The restorers were a rather young ideology within the Brotherhood. They tried to combine elements of both the preservationist and reactionary ideology. Their most distinctive feature was their approach to the politics of the wasteland since they tried to claim dominion over the people of the wasteland. Since they thought of themselves as the only hope for the continued survival of humankind, their goal was to establish a strong presence within their domain to ensure that the common people of the wasteland obeyed their laws.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Scribe.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was a scribe with the Brotherhood of Steel. [PAWN_pronoun] received advanced education in many fields such as medicine, engineering, biology and the history of the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t much of a fighter, which wasn’t necessary since combat duties were carried out by the military branch of [PAWN_possessive] chapter.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Brotherhood_Squire.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was a squire within the Brotherhood of Steel. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained and educated by senior members. While the Brotherhood puts an emphasis on military training, all squires receive some formal education, a privilege many inhabitants of the Wastelands did not enjoy.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Canteen_Apprentice.des: While the Brotherhood usually shunned luxuries, the elders did acknowledge the boost of morale a fine, or at least not revolting, meal offered. As a squire, [PAWN_nameDef] showed a talent for cooking, especially in the large portions the Brotherhood’s canteens needed to feed its members and regularly helped out the staff in [PAWN_possessive] spare time.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_a.description: After decades of service, [PAWN_nameDef] rose through the Brotherhood's ranks to become an Elder. [PAWN_pronoun] has witnessed the rise and fall of many chapters, the loss of countless brothers and sisters, and the endless struggle to preserve humanity's technological heritage. The weight of leadership has changed [PAWN_objective] - where once [PAWN_pronoun] was a fierce warrior, now [PAWN_pronoun] is a careful strategist who must balance the Brotherhood's mission with the lives under [PAWN_possessive] command.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_a.title: Brotherhood Elder
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_b.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became an Elder not through political maneuvering, but through sheer competence and unwavering dedication to the Brotherhood's ideals. [PAWN_pronoun] has led countless expeditions into the wasteland, secured vital technology caches, and negotiated with both allies and enemies. Though [PAWN_possessive] body shows the wear of decades in power armor, [PAWN_possessive] mind remains sharp and [PAWN_possessive] resolve unshakeable. To [PAWN_objective], the Brotherhood is not just an organization—it is humanity's last hope.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_b.title: Brotherhood Elder
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_c.description: Power corrupts, and [PAWN_nameDef] has felt its influence. What began as righteous leadership of a Brotherhood chapter slowly transformed into authoritarian control. [PAWN_pronoun] justifies every harsh decision, every sacrifice of subordinates, as necessary for the greater good. The Brotherhood's mission has become [PAWN_possessive] personal crusade, and [PAWN_pronoun] will crush anyone—within or without the organization—who stands in [PAWN_possessive] way. Some whisper that [PAWN_pronoun] has forgotten what they're fighting to preserve.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Elder_c.title: Brotherhood Elder
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Junior_Scribe.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] showed signs of above average intelligence while being educated by the Brotherhood’s Scribes. [PAWN_pronoun] was soon recruited into their ranks where [PAWN_pronoun] could put [PAWN_possessive] mental capabilities to good use. [PAWN_pronoun] may not have been the best fighter the Brotherhood had to offer, but that was the knight’s task anyway.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Junior_Scribe.title: Junior Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_a.description: From the moment [PAWN_nameDef] was deemed worthy of Knight status, [PAWN_pronoun] dedicated [PAWN_possessive] life to perfecting battlefield tactics. While others sought glory, [PAWN_pronoun] understood that the Brotherhood’s true strength was in strategy and discipline. Every battle was another test, every engagement another lesson. Though [PAWN_pronoun] holds respect for Brotherhood ideals, [PAWN_pronoun] values cold efficiency over blind loyalty. In the end, only the strongest deserve survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_a.title: Brotherhood Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_b.description: Unlike many of [PAWN_possessive] peers, [PAWN_nameDef] never saw battle as duty it was a privilege. From [PAWN_possessive] first kill as an Initiate, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to revel in combat, the thrill of watching enemies fall beneath superior firepower. While others spoke of honor, [PAWN_pronoun] focused on efficiency. If the Brotherhood demanded violence, then [PAWN_pronoun] would be the first to deliver it, without hesitation or remorse. Some whisper that [PAWN_pronoun] enjoys war too much but the Brotherhood needs killers just as much as it needs strategists.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_b.title: Brotherhood Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_c.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived by one philosophy: weakness is death. Raised by a Paladin who survived countless campaigns, [PAWN_pronoun] was taught that mercy was just another form of hesitation. By the time [PAWN_pronoun] became a Knight, [PAWN_pronoun] had already survived more firefights than many ever would. Now, clad in Brotherhood armor, [PAWN_pronoun] fights without fear, believing that only war can shape a soldier into something greater.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_c.title: Brotherhood Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_d.description: There was a time when [PAWN_nameDef] believed in the Brotherhood’s mission without question. Technology was sacred, and its protection was a noble duty. But after years on the battlefield, after watching good soldiers die over scraps of machinery, doubt crept in. Was the Brotherhood truly saving humanity, or just hoarding power? Though [PAWN_pronoun] still fights, a deep cynicism has set in. The mission continues, but faith is a distant memory.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_d.title: Brotherhood Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_e.description: To [PAWN_nameDef], the wasteland is a plague, and it must be cleansed. Mutants, raiders, ghouls none of them deserve to exist. [PAWN_pronoun] believes the Brotherhood’s true mission is extermination, a purge to restore what humanity once was. Where others hesitate, [PAWN_pronoun] strikes without mercy, convinced that every kill brings the world one step closer to order.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Knight_e.title: Brotherhood Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outsider_Recruit.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] once was an ordinary wastelander but happened to meet a group of the Brotherhood which, unlike many others, wasn’t opposed to the recruitment of outsiders. Before long, [PAWN_pronoun] was accepted as an aspirant and trained and studied alongside some of mankind’s finest warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outsider_Recruit.title: Outsider Recruit
Outsider Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_a.description: Years of wasteland warfare have taken their toll on [PAWN_nameDef]. Once, [PAWN_pronoun] fought alongside comrades, shared war stories, and believed in Brotherhood unity. But too many battles, too many losses, and too many betrayals have left [PAWN_pronoun] withdrawn. Words are useless actions are all that matter. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] speaks only when absolutely necessary, giving orders with curt nods and executing missions with cold efficiency. Others see [PAWN_pronoun] as distant, even callous, but in truth, [PAWN_pronoun] simply no longer sees the point in meaningless conversation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_a.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_b.description: Respect is earned through power, and [PAWN_nameDef] has spent a lifetime proving it. The Brotherhood must be ruled with an iron fist, and those who challenge it must be crushed. Mercy is weakness. Disobedience is death. The wasteland is not a place for kindness it is a place where only the strongest survive. And under [PAWN_possessive] leadership, the Brotherhood will not just survive. It will dominate.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_b.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_c.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stopped thinking of [PAWN_possessive]self as human long ago. Battlefields are all [PAWN_pronoun] knows, and power armor is the only thing that feels like home. The Brotherhood gives [PAWN_pronoun] orders, and [PAWN_pronoun] executes them, no questions asked. Emotions are a distraction, doubts are for the weak. A Paladin exists to fight, to kill, and to win. Nothing else matters.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_c.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_d.description: To most Paladins, war is about territory and power. To [PAWN_nameDef], war is about preservation. Every Brotherhood battle is another step toward reclaiming what was lost. While others waste their time with bloodshed, [PAWN_pronoun] ensures that old-world technology is protected. Whether it be a crashed Enclave vertibird or a pre-war archive, [PAWN_pronoun] will stop at nothing to secure it—even if it means disobeying orders.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_d.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_e.description: War is all [PAWN_nameDef] has ever known. As a Knight, [PAWN_pronoun] was relentless in battle, crushing raiders, mutants, and heretics without mercy. As a Paladin, [PAWN_pronoun] became a force of destruction, leading squads to burn down NCR strongholds and wipe out Mutant threats before they could rise. The Brotherhood does not ask for diplomacy it asks for war. And [PAWN_pronoun] is always ready to deliver.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_e.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_f.description: For decades, [PAWN_nameDef] has stood as a wall between the Brotherhood and its enemies. While others sought glory, [PAWN_pronoun] sought only to endure. Through gunfire, explosions, and the deaths of countless comrades, [PAWN_pronoun] never wavered. Battle scars cover [PAWN_possessive] body, but none have broken [PAWN_pronoun] yet. If the Brotherhood must survive, it needs Paladins who refuse to fall, Paladins like [PAWN_nameDef].
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladin_f.title: Brotherhood Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladins_Kid.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] was the child of an esteemed paladin of the Brotherhood of Steel. [PAWN_pronoun] trained harder than most other squires, as [PAWN_pronoun] wished to surpass the renown of [PAWN_possessive] parent. The constant training and learning combined with a somewhat aloof attitude towards [PAWN_possessive] peers left [PAWN_objective] somewhat isolated.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Paladins_Kid.title: Paladin’s Kid
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Patrol_Leader.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was a patrol leader within the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] led [PAWN_possessive] team on the long patrols along the perimeters of chapter’s outposts and encampments. Most of the time, they fought against invasive beasts from the wasteland and the occasional raider. While it was indeed a necessary duty, [PAWN_nameDef] longed to be assigned a more proactive task.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Patrol_Leader.title: Patrol Leader
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Rebellious_Youth.descr: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was a well-known troublemaker in the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t devious, just a bit unruly. However, that was enough to ensure [PAWN_pronoun] spent a lot of time cleaning latrines, peeling tatos and other unpleasant tasks [PAWN_pronoun] was sentenced to by the elders.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Rebellious_Youth.title: Rebellious Youth
Rebellious Youth
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Requisitioner.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked by [PAWN_possessive] chapter to requisition materials, they weren’t capable or willing to produce themselves. [PAWN_pronoun] was advised to treat outsiders fairly and barter with them for the goods the Brotherhood desired. If they proved to be uncooperative however, [PAWN_pronoun] was allowed to confiscate wares the chapter needed. This made many wastelanders somewhat wary of [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Requisitioner.title: Requisitioner
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scarred_Survivor.descr: During [PAWN_possessive] time as a squire [PAWN_nameDef] survived an encounter with one of the wasteland’s many dangerous beasts. While this trauma did not diminish [PAWN_possessive] determination, it left several scars on the outside. [PAWN_nameDef] wore them with pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scarred_Survivor.title: Scarred Survivor
Scarred Survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_a.description: The Brotherhood hoards technology, but does it truly understand it? [PAWN_nameDef] always questioned this. Why destroy AI cores instead of using them? Why limit cybernetics instead of embracing them? The Brotherhood clings to the past, fearing what it does not control. But [PAWN_pronoun] sees potential where others see danger. If [PAWN_pronoun] is discovered, [PAWN_possessive] research will be burned, [PAWN_possessive] name erased from history. But progress demands risk. And [PAWN_nameDef] is willing to take it.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_a.title: Brotherhood Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_b.description: At first, [PAWN_nameDef] believed in the Brotherhood’s mission. Knowledge must be preserved. Technology must be controlled. But years of restricted research, censored discoveries, and lost breakthroughs wore [PAWN_pronoun] down. [PAWN_possessive] work was buried, [PAWN_possessive] theories ignored, and for what? Brotherhood dogma? [PAWN_pronoun] still serves, still researches, but the passion is gone. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] simply follows orders, wondering what could have been if the Brotherhood truly embraced progress.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_b.title: Brotherhood Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_c.description: Unlike most Scribes, [PAWN_nameDef] never felt at home in the archives. Instead of musty books and lab equipment, [PAWN_pronoun] preferred the wasteland, the ruined cities, the lost bunkers, the places where history still lingers. [PAWN_possessive] research is done in the field, often alongside Knights and Paladins, scavenging for lost knowledge firsthand. Some say [PAWN_pronoun] is reckless, but [PAWN_possessive] work has uncovered more than any Scribe confined to a desk ever could.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_c.title: Brotherhood Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_d.description: The Brotherhood’s history is as valuable as its technology, and [PAWN_nameDef] has dedicated [PAWN_possessive] life to preserving both. While others see combat as the Brotherhood’s true mission, [PAWN_pronoun] knows that without records, without archives, all they are is another warband doomed to be forgotten. [PAWN_pronoun] has spent years studying old world data, compiling Brotherhood reports, and ensuring that no knowledge, no matter how minor is ever lost again.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_d.title: Brotherhood Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_e.description: The Brotherhood was built on war, but [PAWN_nameDef] has always believed their mission was preservation, not destruction. While others study weapons and armor, [PAWN_pronoun] has focused on medicine, clean energy, and agricultural advancements. The wasteland does not need more warriors; it needs healers, scientists, and builders. But the Brotherhood does not tolerate dissent, and so [PAWN_pronoun] keeps [PAWN_possessive] views to [PAWN_possessive]self, working in secret to preserve life rather than take it.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Scribe_e.title: Brotherhood Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_a.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Brotherhood deep in a bunker underground. As [PAWN_pronoun] grew up within the bunker, [PAWN_pronoun] was assigned Knight that worked in the workshop. [PAWN_nameDef] gained valuable knowledge with tools but came at a cost of weapons proficiency. [PAWN_nameDef] rarely saw the surface during childhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_a.title: Brotherhood Squire
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_b.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the wasteland. Abandoned as an infant, [PAWN_nameDef] was found by a Brotherhood squad on an assignment to locate salvage for the bunker. [PAWN_pronoun] was raised as a Squire within the Chapter. [PAWN_nameDef] was later assigned to a Knight that saw extensive combat on the surface, when [PAWN_pronoun] reached the age of 13. This helped [PAWN_possessive] with combat prowess and endurance training even at a younger age.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_b.title: Brotherhood Squire
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_c.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born to prominent pair of Brotherhood members. Expectations were high for the child. The father who was a Paladin, wanted [PAWN_nameDef] to become a strong Knight. [PAWN_possessive] intelligence was high as a child, but caused problems when in combat situations. [PAWN_pronoun] was assigned to the Knight that handled base security and maintenance. On one security patrol within the bunker, a pipe burst and fell onto [PAWN_nameDef] causing lasting damage.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_c.title: Brotherhood Squire
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_d.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lost both of [PAWN_possessive] parents early in their childhood during a skirmish with Super Mutants. [PAWN_pronoun] heard stories about [PAWN_possessive] parents from the leading Archivist in the bunker. That inspired [PAWN_possessive] dream of becoming a great Paladin in the future. That road was far off but [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to a well respected Knight with a decade of combat experience. Once [PAWN_nameDef] old enough, [PAWN_pronoun] traveled on every wasteland expedition that the Knight was attached to. [PAWN_nameDef] was credited with several Super Mutant kills at the age of 14.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Squire_d.title: Brotherhood Squire
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Youngling_Historian.de: [PAWN_nameDef] always had an interest in the history of mankind, much to the irritation of [PAWN_possessive] teachers, as the Brotherhood had a very pragmatic mentality and preferred to teach their younglings more “useful” things. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t satisfied with the knowledge of how things are, but wanted to know how they came to be, not only in regard of the Brotherhoods own history. The rise and eventual fall of humanity was what fascinated [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_pronoun] often procured this knowledge through unconventional means.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Zealous_Aspirant.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] took the scribes lessons about the impurity of the ghoul, the supermutant and the other mutated abominations to heart. Maybe even a bit too much, for soon [PAWN_pronoun] was known as a merciless zealot. [PAWN_nameDef] preferred to fight [PAWN_possessive] battles up close and personal.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Zealous_Aspirant.title: Zealous Aspirant
Zealous Aspirant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Armorer.descrip: Maintained and repaired the chapter's weapons and armor during the lean years in Hidden Valley. Became an expert at keeping aging equipment functional with minimal resources and salvaged components.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Armorer.title: Brotherhood Armorer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Bunker_Scribe.d: Cataloged pre-war technology and maintained the bunker's systems during the years of isolation. Watched helplessly as equipment failures mounted and spare parts dwindled. Became an expert at jury-rigging solutions with whatever materials were available.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Archive_S: Spent childhood studying in the Brotherhood's archives, learning about pre-war technology and the chapter's history. Memorized technical manuals and the Codex while dreaming of the surface world.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Bunker_Bo: Born and raised in the confines of Hidden Valley bunker during the chapter's isolation. Never saw the surface world until the evacuation, learning about the outside only through stories and old Brotherhood records.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Courier_K: Carried messages and small items between different sections of the bunker during childhood. Learned the layout of Hidden Valley's maze-like corridors and developed quick reflexes navigating the tight spaces.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Equipment: Helped maintain and organize the bunker's equipment during childhood. Learned to identify different tools and components while keeping the armory and storage areas tidy and functional.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Hydroponi: Helped tend the bunker's small hydroponic gardens that supplemented their limited food supplies. Learned to coax life from artificial systems in the sterile underground environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Isolation: Endured the psychological challenges of growing up in complete isolation from the outside world. Developed resilience and inner strength while watching the adults around them struggle with despair and cabin fever.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Library_W: Grew up in the bunker's archives and library, surrounded by pre-war books and Brotherhood documentation. Developed a love of learning and knowledge that helped pass the long, confined years.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Medic_Hel: Assisted the bunker's medical staff during childhood, learning basic first aid and patient care. Saw firsthand the physical and psychological toll that isolation took on the chapter members.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Radio_Kid: Grew up helping in the communications center, learning radio protocols and encryption methods. Listened to distant signals from the outside world that painted pictures of places beyond the bunker walls.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Scribe_St: Trained from childhood to become a Scribe, learning to read technical documentation and understand pre-war technology. Showed early aptitude for analysis and problem-solving in the bunker's confined environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Security_: Grew up under the protection and training of the bunker's security forces. Learned basic combat skills and discipline while helping with routine patrols and equipment maintenance.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Tech_Appr: Spent childhood learning to maintain and repair the bunker's aging systems under the guidance of Brotherhood scribes. Small hands were perfect for reaching into tight spaces in the machinery.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Wasteland: Spent childhood listening to stories of the surface world and dreaming of exploration beyond the bunker walls. Imagination flourished in the confined space, creating elaborate fantasies of wasteland adventures.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Child_Workshop_: Spent time in the bunker's workshops, learning to craft and repair equipment from salvaged materials. Developed steady hands and an eye for detail working alongside the chapter's craftsmen.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Communications_: Maintained contact with other Brotherhood chapters and monitored radio frequencies from Hidden Valley. Witnessed the silence that gradually fell over the Brotherhood's network as chapters went dark or fell to their enemies.
Maintained the critical systems keeping Hidden Valley operational during its isolation. Jury-rigged solutions for failing power systems, water purification, and air recycling when replacement parts were unavailable.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Hidden_Valley_K: Served as a Knight in the Hidden Valley bunker under Elder McNamara's cautious leadership. Spent years on patrol missions and bunker security while the chapter remained in lockdown. Witnessed the gradual decline of morale and resources as the outside world moved on without them.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Initiate.descri: Served as an Initiate in the Hidden Valley bunker, performing maintenance duties and basic security tasks. Learned the Brotherhood's ways during its most isolated and demoralized period, when hope was in short supply.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Initiate.title: Hidden Valley Initiate
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Intelligence_An: Analyzed intelligence reports and radio intercepts to track the movements and activities of potential enemies. Watched the NCR expand its influence while the Brotherhood remained powerless to act.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Medical_Officer: Provided medical care to the Hidden Valley chapter during years of declining health and morale. Treated radiation exposure, depression, and the various ailments that come from living in a sealed bunker for too long.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Paladin_Veteran: Rose through the ranks to become a Paladin before the chapter's isolation began. Led missions to HELIOS One and other pre-war facilities. Carries the weight of the Brotherhood's defeats and the knowledge of what they once were.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Quartermaster.d: Managed the dwindling supplies and equipment of Hidden Valley during its years of isolation. Became an expert at rationing, resource allocation, and making difficult decisions about what could be spared. Every bullet and battery pack was precious.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Recon_Specialis: Conducted dangerous reconnaissance missions across the Mojave Wasteland while the chapter remained hidden. Observed the rise of the NCR, the growth of New Vegas, and the changing political landscape from the shadows. Master of stealth and survival.
Oversaw internal security and discipline within Hidden Valley during its years of lockdown. Dealt with growing tensions, desertion attempts, and the slow breakdown of military order as hope faded.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Sentinel.descri: Served as a guard and patrol leader around Hidden Valley's perimeter. Spent countless hours watching the wasteland through periscopes and sensors, alert for NCR patrols or other threats while the chapter hid underground.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Sentinel.title: Mojave Sentinel
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Supply_Runner.d: Conducted secret missions to acquire supplies and equipment for the isolated Hidden Valley chapter. Learned to blend in with wastelanders and traders while maintaining Brotherhood loyalties and operational security.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Mojave_Tech_Specialist: Specialized in maintaining and reverse-engineering pre-war technology found in the Mojave. Worked on power armor systems, energy weapons, and the bunker's aging infrastructure with limited resources and growing desperation.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Archivisti.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the Brotherhood's extensive data archives, ensuring no knowledge was ever lost. [PAWN_pronoun] could navigate the bunker's computer systems better than its corridors.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Archivisti.title: Lost Hills Archivist
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_BunkerChilda.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the depths of the Lost Hills bunker, never seeing the sky until [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough for training. The sterile corridors and humming computers were [PAWN_possessive] only home.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_BunkerChilda.title: Lost Hills bunker child
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ChemistScriber.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] studied pre-war chemical formulas and pharmaceutical knowledge. [PAWN_pronoun] synthesized medicine and experimental compounds in the Brotherhood's laboratories.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ChemistScriber.title: Lost Hills Chemist
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_CodexStudentd.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] memorized passages from the original Codex written by Roger Maxson. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the Brotherhood's way was the only way to save humanity.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_CodexStudentd.title: Lost Hills codex student
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_DataEntryYouthh.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] spent hours at terminals inputting information into the Brotherhood's databases. [PAWN_pronoun] found the repetitive work meditative.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_DataEntryYouthh.title: Lost Hills data entry youth
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ElderCouncilorn.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] served on the Elder Council, making decisions that shaped the Brotherhood's future. [PAWN_pronoun] believed Lost Hills must remain the supreme authority over all chapters.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ElderCouncilorn.title: Lost Hills Elder Councilor
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ElderDescendantf.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] came from a prestigious bloodline dating back to the Brotherhood's founding. [PAWN_pronoun] felt the weight of expectation from birth.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ElderDescendantf.title: Lost Hills elder's descendant
descendant
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Engineert.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the bunker's infrastructure and life support systems. [PAWN_pronoun] understood that without working systems, all the Brotherhood's technology meant nothing.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Engineert.title: Lost Hills Engineer
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_FieldScribem.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] accompanied combat missions to document recovered technology. [PAWN_pronoun] balanced scholarly pursuits with basic combat training, though [PAWN_pronoun] preferred cataloging to fighting.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_FieldScribem.title: Lost Hills Field Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_GunrangeYouthi.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] spent countless hours on the practice range, showing natural talent with firearms. The instructors predicted [PAWN_pronoun] would become a great warrior.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_GunrangeYouthi.title: Lost Hills gunrange youth
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Initiatea.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] trained in the Lost Hills bunker complex, learning the original Codex under the watchful eyes of the Elder Council. [PAWN_pronoun] proved [PAWN_objective]self worthy through rigorous physical and mental trials.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Initiatea.title: Lost Hills Initiate
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Knightc.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the rank of Knight through exemplary service and mastery of power armor. [PAWN_pronoun] upheld the strictest interpretation of the Codex, believing technology should be controlled by the worthy few.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Knightc.title: Lost Hills Knight
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_LogisticsOfficerp.base: [PAWN_nameDef] managed supply lines and resource allocation for the bunker. [PAWN_pronoun] ensured the Brotherhood could maintain its isolationist stance while remaining self-sufficient.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MechanicHelpere.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted in the armory workshops, fetching tools and learning basic repairs. [PAWN_pronoun] dreamed of one day maintaining power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MechanicHelpere.title: Lost Hills mechanic helper
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MedicalAidej.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped in the medical bay, learning basic first aid and anatomy. [PAWN_pronoun] had a gentle touch and steady hands.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MedicalAidej.title: Lost Hills medical aide
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MedicalOfficerk.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] treated wounded Brothers in the medical bay, using both pre-war medical knowledge and wasteland improvisation. [PAWN_pronoun] saw [PAWN_objective]self as keeping the Brotherhood's most valuable resource alive.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_MedicalOfficerk.title: Lost Hills Medical Officer
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Paladind.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to the elite rank of Paladin, leading missions to recover pre-war technology and eliminate threats to the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] embodied the warrior spirit of Roger Maxson himself.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Paladind.title: Lost Hills Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_PowerArmorTecho.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized exclusively in power armor maintenance and modification. [PAWN_pronoun] knew every servo and fusion cell of the T-51b suits like [PAWN_pronoun] knew [PAWN_objective] own body.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_PowerArmorTecho.title: Lost Hills Power Armor Tech
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ReconSpecialistq.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] scouted the California wasteland for threats and technology caches. [PAWN_pronoun] moved silently through ruins, gathering intelligence for the Elder Council.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ReconSpecialistq.title: Lost Hills Recon Specialist
Recon Spec
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Recruiterg.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ventured into the wastes to identify potential recruits for the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] sought only the most exceptional individuals, maintaining Lost Hills' high standards.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Recruiterg.title: Lost Hills Recruiter
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_ScribeApprenticeb.base: [PAWN_nameDef] shadowed senior Scribes through the archives, learning to catalog pre-war technology. [PAWN_pronoun] showed early aptitude for technical knowledge.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Scribeb.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] dedicated [PAWN_objective]self to preserving pre-war knowledge in the vast archives beneath Lost Hills. [PAWN_pronoun] spent years cataloging technology and studying the old world's secrets.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Scribeb.title: Lost Hills Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SecurityChiefl.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] oversaw security protocols for the bunker complex, ensuring no unauthorized access to Brotherhood secrets. [PAWN_pronoun] was paranoid about outsider infiltration.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SecurityChiefl.title: Lost Hills Security Chief
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SecurityWardg.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] shadowed security patrols through the bunker, learning to spot threats and maintain vigilance. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught to trust no outsider.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SecurityWardg.title: Lost Hills security ward
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SeniorScribee.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] achieved senior rank in the Scribe order, overseeing research projects and training new members. [PAWN_pronoun] believed preserving knowledge was humanity's only path to survival.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SeniorScribee.title: Lost Hills Senior Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Sentinelh.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] held the highest rank a warrior could achieve in Lost Hills. [PAWN_pronoun] commanded respect through decades of service and unwavering dedication to the original Codex.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Sentinelh.title: Lost Hills Sentinel
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SquireCandidatec.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] trained in basic combat and Brotherhood doctrine, hoping to one day wear power armor. [PAWN_pronoun] idolized the Paladins who protected the chapter.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_SquireCandidatec.title: Lost Hills squire candidate
squire
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_TechAdeptf.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in maintaining the Brotherhood's arsenal of power armor and energy weapons. [PAWN_pronoun] viewed each piece of pre-war technology as sacred, treating them with reverence.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_TechAdeptf.title: Lost Hills Tech Adept
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_TrainingInstructors.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] trained new Initiates in Brotherhood doctrine and combat skills. [PAWN_pronoun] was known for [PAWN_possessive] harsh methods and uncompromising standards.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Weaponsmithj.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] crafted and repaired weapons in the Brotherhood's armory. [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in maintaining the chapter's arsenal to pre-war military specifications.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_LostHills_Weaponsmithj.title: Lost Hills Weaponsmith
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Armourerr.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained weapons and armor for the chapter's diverse forces. [PAWN_pronoun] worked with everything from tribal spears to laser rifles.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Armourerr.title: Midwestern armourer
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_CaravanGuardi.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] protected Brotherhood trade caravans across the dangerous Midwest. [PAWN_pronoun] knew every raider gang and mutant nest between settlements.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_CaravanGuardi.title: Midwestern caravan guard
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_CommandOfficerl.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] coordinated military operations across multiple settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] answered to the General, not some distant Elder Council.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_CommandOfficerl.title: Midwestern command officer
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Engineerq.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] built fortifications and infrastructure for expanding Brotherhood territory. [PAWN_pronoun] turned wilderness into civilization.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Engineerq.title: Midwestern engineer
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_FarmYouthh.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked on Brotherhood agricultural projects, helping feed the expanding territory. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that survival required more than weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_FarmYouthh.title: Midwestern farm youth
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_FieldCommanderp.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] led squads in territory expansion operations. [PAWN_pronoun] made tactical decisions independently, far from headquarters oversight.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_FieldCommanderp.title: Midwestern field commander
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_GeneralAidet.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served directly under the General, helping implement the Midwest Doctrine. [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed the chapter's divergence from Lost Hills firsthand.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_GeneralAidet.title: Midwestern general's aide
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Knightd.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wore power armor in defense of Midwestern settlements, seen as a protector rather than an overlord. [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in safeguarding the common people.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Knightd.title: Midwestern knight
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_MedicalApprenticej.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] learned medicine from Brotherhood medics, treating both members and civilians. [PAWN_pronoun] believed healing shouldn't be restricted.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_MedicalApprenticej.title: Midwestern medical apprentice
apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Medicj.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] treated both Brotherhood members and civilians, believing medical care shouldn't be restricted by chapter politics. [PAWN_pronoun] saved many lives.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Medicj.title: Midwestern medic
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_MessengerKide.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran messages between Brotherhood outposts, learning the territory. [PAWN_pronoun] was fast and reliable.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_MessengerKide.title: Midwestern messenger kid
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_OrphanAdoptg.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was orphaned by raiders and taken in by the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] found a new family among the chapter's members.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_OrphanAdoptg.title: Midwestern orphan adoptee
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Paladine.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] led missions deep into hostile territory, bringing Brotherhood protection to isolated communities. [PAWN_pronoun] believed in active intervention, not isolation.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Paladine.title: Midwestern paladin
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_PowerArmorPiloto.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] piloted one of the chapter's precious power armor suits. Despite coming from humble origins, [PAWN_pronoun] earned this honor through merit.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_PowerArmorPiloto.title: Midwestern power armor pilot
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_RecruitmentOfficerf.base: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled the wasteland seeking promising individuals to join the Brotherhood. Unlike Lost Hills, [PAWN_pronoun] valued character over pedigree.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_RecruitTraineec.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] entered Brotherhood training young, learning alongside children from diverse backgrounds. [PAWN_pronoun] saw the strength in unity.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_RecruitTraineec.title: Midwestern recruit trainee
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SalvageSpecialistm.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged pre-war ruins for useful technology. [PAWN_pronoun] understood that in the Midwest, you used what you could find.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SalvageSpecialistm.title: Midwestern salvage specialist
salvager
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_ScoutRangers.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ranged far ahead of Brotherhood forces, mapping territory and identifying threats. [PAWN_pronoun] spent more time in the wild than in any settlement.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_ScoutRangers.title: Midwestern scout ranger
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Scribec.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] documented the Brotherhood's expansion across the Midwest, recording both victories and lessons learned. [PAWN_pronoun] advocated for sharing knowledge with worthy outsiders.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Scribec.title: Midwestern scribe
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_ScribeStudentd.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] studied under Brotherhood Scribes, learning both technology and practical skills. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught that knowledge should help people, not just be preserved.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_ScribeStudentd.title: Midwestern scribe student
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Sentinelk.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] achieved the highest warrior rank through decades of service. [PAWN_pronoun] commanded respect from both Brotherhood and civilians alike.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Sentinelk.title: Midwestern sentinel
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SettlementChildb.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a Brotherhood-protected settlement, seeing armored knights as heroes rather than overlords. [PAWN_pronoun] wanted to join them.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SettlementChildb.title: Midwestern settlement child
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SettlementLiaisong.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained relations between the Brotherhood and civilian settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] negotiated trade agreements and mutual defense pacts.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SettlementLiaisong.title: Midwestern settlement liaison
liaison
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SquireCandidatei.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] trained as a squire candidate, hoping to one day wear power armor. [PAWN_pronoun] knew anyone could rise through merit in the Midwestern chapter.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_SquireCandidatei.title: Midwestern squire candidate
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TechSpecialisth.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] repaired and maintained equipment in the field, often improvising when proper parts weren't available. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to be resourceful.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TechSpecialisth.title: Midwestern tech specialist
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Trainingsergeantn.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] trained diverse recruits from tribal and wasteland backgrounds. [PAWN_pronoun] proved that anyone could become Brotherhood, given proper instruction.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Trainingsergeantn.title: Midwestern training sergeant
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TribalRecruita.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited from a tribal village, showing exceptional potential. The Midwestern Brotherhood saw value where Lost Hills saw only primitives.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TribalRecruita.title: Midwestern tribal recruit
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TribalYoutha.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a tribal village before being recruited by the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to blend old ways with new technology.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_TribalYoutha.title: Midwestern tribal youth
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Warriorb.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as frontline infantry in the Midwestern Brotherhood's expansionist campaigns. [PAWN_pronoun] believed technology should serve humanity, not be hoarded.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_Warriorb.title: Midwestern warrior
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_WorkshopHelperf.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted in repair workshops, learning to fix equipment. [PAWN_pronoun] showed aptitude for mechanical work.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Midwest_WorkshopHelperf.title: Midwestern workshop helper
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Cit: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in maintaining the Citadel's defenses and infrastructure, ensuring the Pride's stronghold remained secure against all threats.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Coo: [PAWN_nameDef] kept the Citadel fed, preparing hearty meals for Knights and Scribes and boosting morale with every meal served for the Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Dem: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in explosives, clearing rubble and disabling enemy fortifications for the Pride's operations in the Capital Wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Fie: [PAWN_nameDef] trained new recruits in weapons handling, tactics, and survival, shaping the next generation of Lyons' Pride warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Mec: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the Pride's vehicles and power armor, ensuring every machine was ready for battle at a moment's notice.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Pow: [PAWN_nameDef] mastered the use and maintenance of power armor, leading charges against super mutants and protecting Lyons' Pride interests with unmatched resilience.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Qua: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the Pride's armory, distributing weapons and supplies to Knights and Scribes, and ensuring nothing was wasted in the fight for survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Rec: [PAWN_nameDef] excelled at scouting enemy positions and gathering intelligence, often venturing deep into hostile territory to ensure the Pride's tactical advantage.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Sal: [PAWN_nameDef] led expeditions into dangerous ruins, recovering valuable technology and resources for the Pride's continued survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Sco: [PAWN_nameDef] led reconnaissance teams through the ruins of DC, mapping safe routes and identifying threats before they could strike for the Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Knight_Was: After years of training, [PAWN_nameDef] became a full-fledged Knight, patrolling the ruins of DC and defending settlements from raiders and mutants. [PAWN_pronoun] earned a reputation for bravery and tactical skill among the Lyons' Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Paladin_Ly: [PAWN_nameDef] fought alongside the legendary Lyons' Pride, facing the Capital Wasteland's greatest threats. [PAWN_pronoun] is respected for [PAWN_possessive] courage and unwavering loyalty to the Pride's ideals.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Paladin_Ou: [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with tracking and confronting Outcasts, enforcing Elder Lyons' vision and protecting the unity of the Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Arc: [PAWN_nameDef] dedicated [PAWN_possessive] life to preserving the Pride's history and cataloging every piece of recovered technology and lore.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Com: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained radio contact between patrols and the Citadel, coordinating missions and relaying vital information for the Pride across the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Dip: [PAWN_nameDef] negotiated with wasteland settlements and rival factions on behalf of Lyons' Pride, forging alliances and securing resources for the cause.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Fie: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled the wasteland to study mutated flora and fauna, providing the Pride with valuable scientific insights and survival knowledge.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Med: [PAWN_nameDef] focused on developing new treatments and medicines, using both pre-war knowledge and wasteland discoveries to heal the Pride's wounded.
Dedicated to saving lives, [PAWN_nameDef] became a medical specialist, treating wounded Lyons' Pride members and researching advanced healing techniques.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Scribe_Tec: As a Scribe, [PAWN_nameDef] scoured the wasteland for lost knowledge and pre-war technology, documenting every discovery for the Lyons' Pride archives.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Arc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] early years helping Pride archivists preserve and study pre-war documents, learning the importance of history and record-keeping.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Bun: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised within the fortified walls of the Citadel. From a young age, [PAWN_pronoun] learned the value of discipline, order, and the importance of technology in rebuilding civilization as part of Lyons' Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Can: While the Pride shunned luxuries, the elders acknowledged the morale boost a decent meal offered. As a squire, [PAWN_nameDef] showed a talent for cooking and regularly helped out the canteen staff.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Fie: Assigned to the medbay, [PAWN_nameDef] learned basic first aid and battlefield triage, preparing [PAWN_objective] for the harsh realities of wasteland combat as part of Lyons' Pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Jun: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted Pride medics with basic first aid and learned to care for the wounded, developing a steady hand and a compassionate heart.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Mes: [PAWN_nameDef] learned responsibility and teamwork by helping organize meals and supplies in the Pride's mess hall, ensuring everyone was fed and accounted for.
[PAWN_nameDef] was trusted to deliver messages and supplies throughout the Citadel, learning the importance of reliability and quick thinking in Pride operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Pow: From a young age, [PAWN_nameDef] was fascinated by the Pride's iconic power armor. [PAWN_pronoun] spent countless hours learning to maintain and eventually operate these technological marvels.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Sco: From a young age, [PAWN_nameDef] was taught to navigate the ruins of DC, learning stealth, observation, and survival skills from Pride scouts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Scr: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen by a Pride Scribe for early mentorship, learning to read, write, and analyze ancient texts and schematics.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Tec: Fascinated by pre-war relics, [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth assisting Pride Scribes in restoring ancient technology, learning the value of knowledge and patience.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Was: Orphaned by raiders, [PAWN_nameDef] was rescued by a Lyons' Pride patrol and given a new purpose. Life in the Citadel was strict, but [PAWN_pronoun] thrived under the Pride's guidance.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_Wor: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was often found in the Pride's workshops, learning to repair weapons and armor under the watchful eyes of veteran mechanics.
[PAWN_nameDef] was always curious about how things worked, often found disassembling and reassembling gadgets in the Pride's workshops under the guidance of patient Knights.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Squire_You: [PAWN_nameDef] always had an interest in the history of mankind, much to the irritation of [PAWN_possessive] teachers, as the Pride preferred to teach more “useful” things. [PAWN_pronoun] often procured knowledge through unconventional means.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Archivist.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for preserving Outcast records and analyzing pre-war data, ensuring nothing of value was lost to time.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Communication: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained radio contact between patrols and camps, coordinating missions and relaying vital information across the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Cook.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] kept the Outcast camps fed, preparing meals from whatever could be scavenged and boosting morale with every meal served.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Cook.title: Outcast Cook
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Demolitions_E: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in explosives, clearing obstacles and sabotaging enemy fortifications for Outcast operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Diplomat.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] negotiated with wasteland settlements and rival factions, forging alliances and securing resources for the Outcasts' survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Field_Command: [PAWN_nameDef] rose through the ranks to command Outcast squads, coordinating raids and defensive actions with tactical precision.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Field_Instruc: [PAWN_nameDef] taught Outcast recruits the harsh realities of wasteland survival, from foraging to field repairs and combat drills.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Field_Researc: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled the wasteland to study mutated flora and fauna, providing the Outcasts with valuable scientific insights and survival knowledge.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Instructor.de: [PAWN_nameDef] trained new Outcast recruits in weapons handling, tactics, and survival, shaping the next generation of warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Logistics_Off: [PAWN_nameDef] coordinated the movement of supplies and personnel between Outcast camps, ensuring that every squad had what they needed to survive and fight.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Mechanic.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the Outcasts' vehicles and equipment, ensuring every machine was ready for battle at a moment's notice.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Medical_Offic: [PAWN_nameDef] became a skilled medic, treating wounded Outcasts and developing new field medicine techniques for survival in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Power_Armor_S: [PAWN_nameDef] became an expert in maintaining and piloting power armor, leading Outcast charges into the most dangerous battles.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Quartermaster: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the Outcasts' armory and supplies, ensuring every squad was equipped for survival and combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Recon_Special: [PAWN_nameDef] excelled at scouting enemy positions and gathering intelligence, often venturing deep into hostile territory for the Outcasts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Salvager.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] led expeditions into dangerous ruins, recovering valuable technology and resources to keep the Outcasts supplied and operational.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Scout_Captain: [PAWN_nameDef] led reconnaissance teams through the ruins, mapping safe routes and identifying threats before they could strike at the Outcasts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Scribe.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] dedicated [PAWN_possessive] life to preserving Outcast knowledge and cataloging every piece of recovered technology and lore.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Scribe.title: Outcast Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Archiv: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] early years helping Outcast archivists preserve and study pre-war documents, learning the importance of history and record-keeping.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Bunker: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised in the Outcasts' underground bunkers, learning discipline, caution, and the value of every resource from an early age.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Field_: Assigned to the Outcasts' medbay, [PAWN_nameDef] learned basic first aid and triage, preparing for the realities of life on the front lines.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Mechan: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood in the workshops, learning to repair and maintain the Outcasts' technology and vehicles, ensuring their operations ran smoothly.
[PAWN_nameDef] learned the basics of medicine by assisting the Outcast medics, developing skills in first aid and care for the wounded.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Mess_H: [PAWN_nameDef] learned responsibility and teamwork by helping organize meals and supplies in the Outcasts' mess hall, ensuring everyone was fed and accounted for.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Power_: Fascinated by power armor, [PAWN_nameDef] spent countless hours learning to maintain and eventually operate these symbols of Outcast strength.
[PAWN_nameDef] was trained as a scout, learning to navigate the wasteland and gather intelligence on enemy movements, ensuring the safety of the Brotherhood Outcasts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Scout_: [PAWN_nameDef] took on a leadership role among the younger scouts, guiding them through the wasteland and teaching them the skills necessary for survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Scribe: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen by an Outcast Scribe for early mentorship, learning to read, write, and analyze ancient texts and schematics.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Supply: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for delivering supplies between Outcast camps, learning the importance of speed and reliability in the harsh wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Tech_A: [PAWN_nameDef] showed an early aptitude for technology, assisting Outcast engineers in salvaging and restoring pre-war devices.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Wastel: Orphaned by the dangers of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] was taken in by the Outcasts and quickly adapted to their harsh, survivalist lifestyle.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Worksh: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was often found in the Outcasts' workshops, learning to repair weapons and armor under the guidance of veteran mechanics.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Squire_Youngl: [PAWN_nameDef] always had an interest in the history of mankind, much to the irritation of [PAWN_possessive] Outcast teachers, who preferred to teach more “practical” things. [PAWN_pronoun] often procured knowledge through unconventional means.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Survivalist.d: [PAWN_nameDef] became an expert in living off the land, teaching others how to hunt, forage, and endure the harshest conditions the wasteland could offer.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_BoS_Outcasts_Veteran_Defen: [PAWN_nameDef] earned a reputation as a stalwart protector of Outcast camps, holding the line against raiders and mutants with unwavering resolve.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Casdin_Adult.des: Casdin led the schism from Lyons' Brotherhood, believing Elder Lyons had abandoned the true mission for sentimental humanitarianism. Now leading the Outcasts, he pursues technology with single-minded determination, trading with wastelanders only to acquire pre-war artifacts. To him, the Codex is law.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Casdin_Child.des: Henry was raised on strict Brotherhood doctrine, memorizing the Codex and learning the original mission: acquire and preserve technology. These teachings would shape his entire worldview.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cross_Adult.desc: Cross rose through the ranks to become one of the most respected Paladins in the Brotherhood. She served as personal bodyguard to the Lone Wanderer's father and has decades of combat experience. Her dedication to duty is absolute.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cross_Child.desc: Cross survived the harsh realities of the wasteland as a young woman before being rescued by the Brotherhood. The experience forged her into a survivor with unshakeable determination and loyalty to those who saved her.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dusk_Adult.descr: Dusk oversees the B Ring laboratory at the Citadel, working closely with Scribes while maintaining security. His unique blend of technical knowledge and combat ability makes him invaluable to Brotherhood operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dusk_Adult.title: Tech-Knight Captain
Captain
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dusk_Child.descr: Dusk was fascinated by technology from a young age, spending hours studying pre-war systems and learning how they functioned. This knowledge would later prove invaluable.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dusk_Child.title: Tech Enthusiast
Enthusiast
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Gallows_Adult.de: Gallows commands the A Ring security detail at the Citadel, ensuring the Brotherhood's headquarters remains secure. He's known for his strict adherence to protocol and his ability to maintain discipline.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Gallows_Child.de: Gallows showed leadership potential from an early age, often organizing training exercises among his peers and demonstrating tactical thinking beyond his years.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Glade_Adult.desc: Glade leads patrols through the ruins of DC, coordinating strike teams against super mutant strongholds. His strategic mind and calm demeanor make him an effective field commander.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Glade_Child.desc: Glade trained as a squire from childhood, learning the Brotherhood's codes and martial disciplines. He showed early promise as a tactical thinker.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Gunny_Adult.desc: Gunny became the Brotherhood's primary weapons expert and range master. He trains new recruits in marksmanship and maintains the Citadel's armory. His expertise with firearms is unmatched.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Gunny_Child.desc: Gunny grew up around weapons, learning to maintain and operate every firearm in the Brotherhood's arsenal. His fascination with ballistics became a lifelong passion.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Kodiak_Adult.des: Kodiak specializes in heavy weapons and power armor operations. He's often deployed to the most dangerous combat zones where overwhelming firepower is needed. His imposing presence and devastating firepower make him a legend among the ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Kodiak_Child.des: Kodiak's size and strength made him a natural for heavy weapons training. Even as a child, he could handle equipment that would burden most adults.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_McGraw_Adult.des: McGraw leads field operations for the Outcasts, scouring the wasteland for technology and eliminating threats to the mission. He's a pragmatic soldier who believes the Brotherhood's true purpose is too important to be diluted by compassion.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_McGraw_Child.des: McGraw learned reconnaissance and patrol tactics as a young recruit, developing keen observational skills and the ability to navigate dangerous territory.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Olin_Adult.descr: Olin evaluates technology brought to the Outcasts, determining what's valuable and what's worthless. He maintains the inventory at Fort Independence and ensures every piece of tech is properly cataloged and stored.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Olin_Adult.title: Technology Specialist
Specialist
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Olin_Child.descr: Olin spent his youth cataloging technology and learning to identify valuable pre-war artifacts. His attention to detail was remarkable.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Olin_Child.title: Archive Assistant
Assistant
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Owyn_Lyons_Adult: Owyn Lyons led an expedition from California to the Capital Wasteland, where he established the Citadel. Unlike traditional Brotherhood doctrine, he believed in helping the people of the wasteland, a decision that earned him both respect and scorn. His compassionate leadership redefined what it meant to be Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Owyn_Lyons_Child: Born into the Brotherhood of Steel in Lost Hills, Owyn grew up immersed in the Brotherhood's ideals of preserving technology and rebuilding civilization. From a young age, he showed exceptional leadership qualities and a deep sense of duty.
Rothchild is the Brotherhood's senior technical expert, overseeing all research and development at the Citadel. He restored Liberty Prime and manages the Brotherhood's most advanced technological projects. His knowledge is encyclopedic, but he has little patience for those who question his methods.
Rothchild demonstrated exceptional intellectual ability from childhood, mastering complex technical manuals and showing an intuitive understanding of pre-war technology that impressed even senior Scribes.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Sarah_Lyons_Adul: Sarah became the youngest Sentinel in Brotherhood history and led the elite Lyons' Pride unit. Fierce, tactical, and unwavering in her commitment to protect the innocent, she earned the respect of every soldier under her command through courage and skill in countless battles.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Sarah_Lyons_Chil: Sarah grew up on the journey from California to DC, experiencing hardship and danger from a young age. Her father, Elder Lyons, ensured she received the finest military training the Brotherhood could provide, and she excelled in every aspect of combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Sibley_Adult.des: Sibley serves as one of Casdin's most loyal soldiers, defending Fort Independence and leading patrols to secure technology. She followed Casdin in the split, believing Lyons had lost his way. Her dedication to the original Brotherhood mission is absolute.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Sibley_Child.des: Sibley grew up believing in the Brotherhood's mission above all else. She learned early that personal feelings had no place when duty called.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Arthur_Maxson_Ad: [PAWN_nameDef] became the youngest Elder in Brotherhood history, uniting the fractured East Coast chapters under [PAWN_possessive] iron will. [PAWN_pronoun] commands the Prydwen and its forces with absolute authority, determined to cleanse the Commonwealth of synths and mutants while reclaiming technology for humanity's survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Arthur_Maxson_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the legendary Maxson bloodline and raised to lead the Brotherhood. As a child, [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed the corruption and decay that followed Lyons' humanitarian policies. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained in both combat and command, learning that only through strength and discipline could the Brotherhood fulfill its true purpose.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Brandis_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] led Recon Squad Artemis until disaster struck - [PAWN_possessive] entire team was killed in the Commonwealth. Wracked with guilt and trauma, [PAWN_pronoun] went into hiding, questioning everything [PAWN_pronoun] once believed about the Brotherhood's invincibility.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Brandis_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to fight for survival in the harsh wasteland before joining the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] found purpose and structure in the Brotherhood's ranks, dedicating [PAWN_objective]self to their military doctrine.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cade_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as the Brotherhood's chief medical officer aboard the Prydwen. [PAWN_pronoun] treats wounded soldiers and manages medical supplies with clinical efficiency. [PAWN_possessive] gruff bedside manner hides genuine concern for [PAWN_possessive] patients' wellbeing.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cade_Adult.title: Chief Medical Officer
Doctor
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cade_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] showed early interest in medicine and human anatomy. [PAWN_pronoun] studied pre-war medical texts and learned to treat injuries, preparing for a career saving lives in the Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cade_Child.title: Medical Student
Student
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Danse_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] rose through the Brotherhood ranks to become a respected Paladin, leading recon teams with tactical precision and unwavering dedication. [PAWN_pronoun] believes absolutely in the Brotherhood's mission, never suspecting [PAWN_possessive] true nature until it's revealed [PAWN_pronoun] is a synth - the very thing [PAWN_pronoun] was trained to destroy.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Danse_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up believing [PAWN_pronoun] was an orphan in the Capital Wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed the Brotherhood's power and nobility firsthand, developing an unwavering belief in their mission. What [PAWN_pronoun] didn't know was that these memories were fabricated - [PAWN_pronoun] was actually a synth.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Haylen_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a field scribe with Recon Squad Gladius, providing technical support and intelligence analysis in dangerous territory. [PAWN_pronoun] maintains communications equipment and analyzes data while supporting [PAWN_possessive] teammates in combat situations.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Haylen_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] showed early aptitude for technology and science, earning [PAWN_possessive] place in the Brotherhood's Scribe order. [PAWN_pronoun] studied pre-war technology with fascination, learning to diagnose and repair complex systems while developing field survival skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Ingram_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] became the Brotherhood's chief engineer despite losing [PAWN_possessive] legs in combat. [PAWN_pronoun] designed [PAWN_possessive] own power armor exoskeleton to compensate, and now maintains the entire Brotherhood fleet including the Prydwen. [PAWN_possessive] expertise keeps the Brotherhood's technology operational.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Ingram_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional mechanical aptitude from childhood. [PAWN_pronoun] could disassemble and rebuild power armor components before most children could read, earning [PAWN_possessive] place in the Brotherhood's engineering division.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Kells_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] commands the Prydwen, the Brotherhood's massive airship headquarters. [PAWN_pronoun] manages all air operations and coordinates ground missions with tactical precision. [PAWN_possessive] by-the-book approach and unwavering loyalty to Elder Maxson make [PAWN_objective] an invaluable asset.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Kells_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up studying military history and tactics, showing natural leadership abilities. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to coordinate complex operations and manage logistics, preparing for a command role in the Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Quinlan_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] leads the Brotherhood's Scribe division, managing all research and intelligence operations.
