[PAWN_pronoun] processes field reports, maintains archives, and coordinates technical support for military operations. [PAWN_possessive] encyclopedic knowledge makes [PAWN_objective] invaluable to the Brotherhood's mission.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Quinlan_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth organizing and cataloging the Brotherhood's extensive archives. [PAWN_pronoun] memorized vast amounts of information and developed expertise in research methodologies and data analysis.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhys_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the rank of Knight through rigorous training and combat experience. [PAWN_pronoun] serves with Recon Squad Gladius, displaying considerable combat skill but struggling with trust issues toward outsiders and a bitter attitude from past losses.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhys_Adult.title: Brotherhood Knight
Knight
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhys_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Brotherhood and raised with strict military discipline. [PAWN_pronoun] trained constantly in combat techniques, developing a competitive nature and strong sense of Brotherhood superiority over outsiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhys_Child.title: Brotherhood Born
BoS Born
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Teagan_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] manages the Brotherhood's supply operations as head quartermaster. [PAWN_pronoun] acquires resources through trade, requisition, and occasionally morally questionable means. [PAWN_pronoun] believes the Brotherhood's mission justifies any method of securing needed supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Teagan_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] learned logistics and resource management from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] tracked supplies, managed inventories, and developed an understanding of what the Brotherhood needed to survive and thrive.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cabbot_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] became the chief librarian at Lost Hills, managing the Brotherhood's vast collection of pre-war knowledge. [PAWN_pronoun] is the go-to expert for finding specific information and has memorized the location of thousands of documents. [PAWN_pronoun] takes great pride in helping others access the information they need.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Cabbot_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up surrounded by books and holotapes in the Brotherhood's extensive library. [PAWN_pronoun] helped organize and catalog materials from an early age, developing a deep appreciation for the preservation of knowledge. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read multiple pre-war languages and became skilled at deciphering damaged texts.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lorraine_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a Scribe in the Brotherhood's San Francisco outpost, focusing on recruitment efforts. [PAWN_pronoun] evaluates potential recruits and determines if they have the skills and dedication the Brotherhood needs. [PAWN_possessive] assessment abilities have brought many valuable members into the organization.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lorraine_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional technical aptitude from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] could disassemble and repair complex devices with ease, impressing the Brotherhood's scribes. [PAWN_pronoun] received specialized training in technology and recruitment assessment.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Mathia_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the rank of Paladin through dedication and combat prowess. [PAWN_pronoun] serves as a guard within Lost Hills and participates in field operations when needed. [PAWN_pronoun] is respected by [PAWN_possessive] peers for [PAWN_possessive] reliability and commitment to the Brotherhood's mission.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Mathia_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a Brotherhood military family and raised with strict discipline. [PAWN_pronoun] trained in combat from childhood, learning to handle weapons and wear power armor. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in physical training and showed natural leadership abilities that impressed [PAWN_possessive] instructors.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Matthew_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to the rank of Senior Paladin and was assigned to the Brotherhood outpost in San Francisco. [PAWN_pronoun] helps maintain Brotherhood interests on the frontier while keeping contact with Lost Hills. [PAWN_possessive] experience and rank make [PAWN_objective] a valuable asset to the organization.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Matthew_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth traveling the West Coast with [PAWN_possessive] Brotherhood family. [PAWN_pronoun] learned about the various settlements and factions, developing an understanding of the wasteland beyond Lost Hills. This experience gave [PAWN_objective] a broader perspective than many Brotherhood members.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Michael_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as an Initiate guarding the entrance to Lost Hills. [PAWN_pronoun] is responsible for screening visitors and protecting the base from threats. Though still low in rank, [PAWN_pronoun] takes [PAWN_possessive] duties seriously and dreams of one day becoming a full Paladin.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Michael_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited into the Brotherhood as a young child after showing promise. [PAWN_pronoun] underwent basic training and education, learning the Brotherhood's values and principles. [PAWN_pronoun] worked hard to prove [PAWN_pronoun] belonged, eager to advance through the ranks and serve the organization.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhombus_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] became the Brotherhood's Head Paladin, commanding all military operations. [PAWN_pronoun] is known for [PAWN_possessive] strict interpretation of the Codex and unwavering dedication to the Brotherhood's isolationist policies. [PAWN_pronoun] believes outsiders are dangerous and that the Brotherhood must remain pure and separate from the wasteland's chaos.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rhombus_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the harsh wasteland, learning to fight for survival from an early age. [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed the dangers of uncontrolled technology and lawless raiders, which shaped [PAWN_possessive] worldview. When the Brotherhood recruited [PAWN_objective], [PAWN_pronoun] found purpose in their disciplined military structure.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Talus_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the rank of Paladin and was assigned to guard the entrance to Lost Hills alongside other defenders. [PAWN_pronoun] has proven [PAWN_objective]self in combat and is trusted to be the first line of defense against any threats to the Brotherhood's primary base.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Talus_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up learning the importance of vigilance and protection. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained to identify threats and respond quickly to danger. [PAWN_possessive] instructors noted [PAWN_possessive] sharp reflexes and ability to remain calm under pressure.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vree_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] became the Brotherhood's Head Scribe, leading all research and documentation efforts. [PAWN_pronoun] conducted groundbreaking research on super mutants and wrote detailed reports on [PAWN_possessive] findings. [PAWN_possessive] work is meticulous and [PAWN_pronoun] believes knowledge and understanding are the Brotherhood's greatest weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vree_Adult.title: Head Scribe
Head Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vree_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional intellectual aptitude from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] was fascinated by pre-war technology and spent countless hours in the Brotherhood's archives, reading everything [PAWN_pronoun] could find. The elder scribes recognized [PAWN_possessive] potential and provided advanced training in scientific methods and technological analysis.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vree_Child.title: Scholar's Apprentice
Apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Barak_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to Senior Paladin through sheer combat excellence. [PAWN_pronoun] led successful campaigns against super mutant armies and raider confederations. [PAWN_possessive] power armor bears the scars of a hundred battles, and [PAWN_possessive] tactical acumen is respected throughout the Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Barak_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in one of the Brotherhood's secure bunkers during the early days of expansion. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up training in combat from the moment [PAWN_pronoun] could hold a weapon. The bunker's cramped conditions taught [PAWN_objective] efficiency and discipline.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Barnaky_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] rose through the ranks to become the supreme military commander of the Midwestern Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] led the expansion across the wasteland, establishing order and recruiting worthy outsiders. [PAWN_possessive] tactical genius and unwavering determination made [PAWN_objective] a legend, though some say [PAWN_pronoun] became too obsessed with victory at any cost.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Barnaky_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised within the Brotherhood after [PAWN_possessive] parents were killed by raiders. [PAWN_pronoun] showed exceptional tactical aptitude from childhood and studied pre-war military strategy extensively. The elder paladins saw in [PAWN_objective] a natural born leader who would one day command armies.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Brixley_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] proved all doubters wrong by rising to the rank of Paladin. [PAWN_pronoun] became a symbol of the Midwestern Brotherhood's inclusive philosophy - that strength and honor matter more than bloodlines. [PAWN_possessive] combat prowess and tactical mind earned respect from even the most traditional Brothers.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Brixley_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a tribal community that the Midwestern Brotherhood encountered during their expansion. Unlike Lost Hills, the Midwest chapter saw potential in tribals. [PAWN_pronoun] volunteered to join, eager to prove that [PAWN_possessive] people deserved respect and could master advanced technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dekker_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the title of Paladin Lord through countless battles across the Midwest. [PAWN_pronoun] commands multiple squads and leads critical missions deep into hostile territory. [PAWN_possessive] warriors would follow [PAWN_objective] into hell itself, knowing [PAWN_pronoun] would never abandon them.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dekker_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up witnessing the brutal realities of wasteland warfare. [PAWN_pronoun] lost friends and comrades to super mutants, raiders, and worse. These experiences forged [PAWN_objective] into a hardened warrior who understood that only strength could protect the innocent.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Pierce_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] earned [PAWN_possessive] place as a Knight Captain through dedication and courage. [PAWN_pronoun] leads squads in power armor patrols and maintains Brotherhood equipment. [PAWN_pronoun] represents the new generation of Brotherhood warriors - recruited from the wasteland but no less committed to the cause.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Pierce_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a settlement protected by the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed their power armor troops defend [PAWN_possessive] home from super mutant attacks and dreamed of joining them. [PAWN_pronoun] trained relentlessly to prove [PAWN_pronoun] was worthy of the Brotherhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rachel_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a Knight, combining combat capability with technical skill. [PAWN_pronoun] can fight effectively in power armor and perform field repairs under fire. [PAWN_possessive] dual expertise makes [PAWN_objective] invaluable on extended missions far from Brotherhood bases.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Rachel_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up learning to repair and maintain Brotherhood technology from [PAWN_possessive] parents. [PAWN_pronoun] could disassemble a laser rifle blindfolded by age twelve. [PAWN_pronoun] combined technical expertise with combat training, preparing for a career as a Knight.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Stiles_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] commands key Brotherhood outposts across the Midwest. [PAWN_pronoun] excels at coordinating multiple units and managing supply lines. [PAWN_possessive] strategic mind ensures Brotherhood forces are always well-positioned to respond to threats. [PAWN_pronoun] believes in the Brotherhood's mission to bring order to chaos.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Stiles_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth scouting ruins and pre-war installations for the Brotherhood. [PAWN_pronoun] developed keen observation skills and learned to read the wasteland's dangers. [PAWN_possessive] ability to assess threats and opportunities proved invaluable.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Trent_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] became Head Scribe of the Midwestern Brotherhood, overseeing all research and technological development. [PAWN_pronoun] pioneered new applications of pre-war technology and trained a generation of scribes. [PAWN_possessive] work on power armor maintenance protocols saved countless lives.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Trent_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in the Brotherhood archives from childhood, organizing pre-war technical manuals and scientific journals. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a photographic memory for technical specifications and learned to decipher corrupted data files. The archives became [PAWN_possessive] second home.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Veronica_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] became a Senior Scribe specializing in medical technology and biological research. [PAWN_pronoun] developed improved stimpak formulations and studied radiation treatment methods. [PAWN_possessive] research saved countless lives and improved quality of life across Brotherhood territories.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Veronica_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] showed aptitude for medicine and biology from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] studied pre-war medical texts and assisted senior scribes in treating wounded Brotherhood soldiers. [PAWN_possessive] steady hands and calm demeanor made [PAWN_objective] a natural healer.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Acolyte_of_Mars.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an acolyte of Mars, spreading the word of Caesar, the son of Mars, through the lands occupied by the Legion. While [PAWN_pronoun] essentially was something in between a priest and a messenger, [PAWN_nameDef] truly thought [PAWN_pronoun] had a divine mission. [PAWN_pronoun] was gifted with words and where [PAWN_pronoun] spoke, the people listened.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Acolyte_of_Mars.title: Legion Acolyte of Mars
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Administrator.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a Legion administrator, tasked with overseeing the logistics that are required to hold together such an innumerable army as the Legion. As such, [PAWN_pronoun] had a talent for numbers, administration and other things most legionaries viewed as the work of profligates.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Administrator.title: Legion Administrator
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Arizona_Trader.description: Not all who lived in the domain of Caesar were part of his army. Many of the inhabitants of more civilized settlements within Legion domain remained relatively free. As a matter of fact, many traders preferred operating in Legion territory, as they managed to keep the roads safe from raiders. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those merchants, traveling around Arizona, New Mexico, Utah and Colorado and dealing with the Legion on a regular basis.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Arizona_Trader.title: Arizona Trader
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Born.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in Legion territory as a child of civilians. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed a relatively uneventful childhood, until the day the Legion decided [PAWN_possessive] labour was needed in a nearby encampment and [PAWN_pronoun] was taken from [PAWN_possessive] parents by force, never to see them again.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Born.title: Legion Born
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Caravan_Child.description: The vast territories the Legion had conquered during a short timespan led to a growing demand in trading caravans. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up traveling the length and width of the southern parts of the wastelands and learned much on the dusty roads.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Caravan_Child.title: Legion Caravan Child
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Carrier_Slave.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was used as a human beast of burden to carry around massive amounts of materiel. [PAWN_pronoun] was treated like cattle for most of [PAWN_possessive] life. Needless to say, that such cruel treatment left deep scars in [PAWN_possessive] soul.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Carrier_Slave.title: Legion Carrier Slave
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Centurion.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an elite soldier of Caesar’s Legion. Unrelenting and fearless in battle, [PAWN_pronoun] was awarded with the rank of centurion. There were few who could match [PAWN_pronoun] in close combat and [PAWN_nameDef] used [PAWN_possessive] abilities to crush anyone foolish enough to stand in the Legion’s way.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Centurion.title: Legion Centurion
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Coin_Minters_Child.descriptio: Like many other larger political entities, Caesar had his Legion mint coins adorned with his profile. [PAWN_nameDef] was born to a minter and enjoyed a relatively peaceful childhood, as the Legion left [PAWN_possessive] family be, due to the rarity of the skill provided by them.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Coin_Minters_Child.title: Coin Minter’s Child
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Colorado_Kid.description: [PAWN_nameDef]’s family came from Colorado. The mountainous state brought forth many skilled miners, builders, and craftspeople, most of which have found employment within the Legion. Those unwilling to do so freely were usually enslaved and put to work anyway.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Colorado_Kid.title: Colorado Kid
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Cook.description: As cynical as it may sound, [PAWN_nameDef] was a rather lucky slave. [PAWN_pronoun] was tasked with the preparation of meals for [PAWN_possessive] Legion camp, which absolved [PAWN_objective] from most of the hardest, most exhausting labour. Truth be told, [PAWN_nameDef] wasn’t even that good a cook, but the Legion’s contempt for luxury ensured that that wasn’t an issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Cook.title: Legion Cook
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Cunning_Whelp.description: From [PAWN_possessive] birth, [PAWN_nameDef] was smaller and weaker than [PAWN_possessive] peers. It was rare for the Legion to let such children live, but [PAWN_nameDef] was one of the lucky few, mainly due to the fact that [PAWN_pronoun] had other skills and qualities than raw strength, [PAWN_pronoun] was cunning.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Cunning_Whelp.title: Cunning Whelp
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Decanus.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a decanus in Caesar’s Legion. It was [PAWN_possessive] duty to lead the rank and file legionaries in battle. [PAWN_nameDef] has been a decanus for many years and yearned for a chance to ascend to the rank of centurion.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Decanus.title: Legion Decanus
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Enslaved_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] early childhood in a small settlement somewhere in the south-western part of the former USA. One day Caesar’s Legion raided the settlement, razing it to the ground and enslaving the survivors. [PAWN_nameDef] was taken as a slave and spent the remainder of [PAWN_possessive] youth in a cage, like an animal.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Enslaved_Child.title: Enslaved Child
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Enslaved_Tribal.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into one of the many tribes which were conquered and subjugated by the Legion. The utter obliteration of the tribe’s culture and traditions left [PAWN_objective] shaken and traumatized.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Enslaved_Tribal.title: Enslaved Tribal
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Flag_Staff_Kid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised in Flag Staff, the capital city of Caesars Legion. While Two Sun served as Arizona’s main trade hub, Flag Staff was the beating heart of the Legion itself.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Flag_Staff_Kid.title: Flag Staff Kid
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Frumentarius.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a frumentarius. As one of the elite intelligence officers [PAWN_nameDef] serves as the mighty Caesars eyes and ears and is tasked with subtle missions, like infiltrating the enemy’s society or gathering intelligence behind enemy lines.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Frumentarius.title: Legion Frumentarius
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Gladiator.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought frequently in the fighting arenas, often located at the centre of Legion camps. [PAWN_pronoun] has won many battles in the arena, leaving [PAWN_possessive] opponents bleeding out in the dust. [PAWN_nameDef] wore [PAWN_possessive] many scars with pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Gladiator.title: Legion Gladiator
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Healer.description: While the Legion shunned most forms of modern technology, including many types of medicine, someone had to keep the Legionaries in fighting condition, patching them up if wounded or putting them down for good if deemed too weak to fight again. [PAWN_nameDef] never got any kind of real medical training but proved to be quite resourceful with needle and thread, as well as several herbal concoctions of questionable quality.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Healer.title: Legion Healer
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Healers_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef]’s mother was a healer in the Legion. While the Legion did not have access to high-tech medicine due to their refusal to use modern technology, the Legion’s healers managed to cook up various poultices, ointments, and other herbal remedies. [PAWN_nameDef] learned a good deal about healing from [PAWN_possessive] mother.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Healers_Child.title: Healer’s Child
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Hunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a trusted enough warrior, to receive advanced hunting equipment. With [PAWN_possessive] trusty rifle, [PAWN_pronoun] prowled through the wasteland, always on the lookout for brahmin, bighorners and other game to fill the bellies of the hungry legionaries at the camp.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Hunter.title: Legion Hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Legionary_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born as the child of a Legionary, as were most children within the Legion since Caesar demanded a child-quota from his soldiers to bolster his army’s ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Legionary_Child.title: Legionary Child
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Magister.description: While the Legion did not put much emphasis on education, there still was a need for someone to teach the values of the Legion to the younglings. [PAWN_nameDef] was in charge of educating the soon-to-be Legionaries. Through [PAWN_objective] they learned how a Legionary had to speak, as well as the most essential things about the Cult of Mars.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Magister.title: Legion Magister
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Miner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a tribe, which was only recently subjugated by the Legion. [PAWN_possessive] tribe lived in the Rocky Mountains, where they lived in caves and canyons. As such they were skilled miners and [PAWN_nameDef] was put to work as a miner for Caesar’s Legion.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Miner.title: Legion Miner
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Peasant.description: While [PAWN_nameDef] wasn’t technically a slave, [PAWN_pronoun] still lived within Legion territory, where [PAWN_pronoun] had to work the land. A large proportion of [PAWN_possessive] produce was confiscated by Legion administrators after each harvest, but [PAWN_nameDef] was still content since Caesar’s warriors kept the raiders at bay and didn’t harass [PAWN_objective] otherwise.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Peasant.title: Legion Peasant
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Praetorian.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of the esteemed praetorian guard, tasked with the protection of none other than the almighty Caesar himself. [PAWN_pronoun] became part of this elite group by challenging and defeating one of the praetorians and took great pride in the fact that few other’s within the Legion would ever be so close to their infallible leader as [PAWN_pronoun] was. Of course, this position was not representative in nature, [PAWN_pronoun] had to be a formidable fighter, capable of dispatching any would-be assassins sent after Caesar.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Praetorian.title: Legion Praetorian
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Promising_Youngling.descripti: Like many other children, [PAWN_nameDef] was born in a Legion war-camp. [PAWN_pronoun] grew faster, taller, and stronger than most other children in the camps and showed great promise during the excruciating trainings, much to the pride of [PAWN_possessive] tutors.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Promising_Youngling.title: Promising Youngling
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Purchased_Slave.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born as the child of a Legionary, as were most children within the Legion since Caesar demanded a child-quota from his soldiers to bolster his army’s ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Purchased_Slave.title: Purchased Slave
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Raised_by_Priestess.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by a Priestess of Mars and enjoyed a relatively (by Legion standards) pampered childhood and a somewhat formal education.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Raised_by_Priestess.title: Raised by Priestess
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit.description: The Legion’s reckless way of war and the consequently high casualties meant that they were always in dire need of new recruits. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those recruits. While [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t have much combat experience, [PAWN_pronoun] was eager to prove himself in the eyes of [PAWN_possessive] decanus and fought ferociously.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_a.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Legion, raised from childhood to see Caesar as a god and the Legion as the only true way forward. [PAWN_pronoun] trained with spears and rifles from an early age, learning discipline, obedience, and the art of war. Now of age, [PAWN_pronoun] stands among the fresh recruits, eager to earn [PAWN_possessive] place in the ranks through blood and conquest.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_a.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_b.description: Caesar is not just a warlord, he is a prophet, a divine ruler destined to unite the wasteland. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a Legion-controlled settlement, where the words of Caesar were absolute truth. When the time came to serve, [PAWN_pronoun] took up arms with fanatical devotion, ready to purge the weak and spread Caesar’s will.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_b.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_c.description: Once, [PAWN_nameDef] belonged to a nomadic desert tribe, skilled in survival and warfare. But weakness is not tolerated. When [PAWN_pronoun] was cast out for failing [PAWN_possessive] people, death seemed certain. Instead, the Legion found [PAWN_pronoun] and offered a place among the recruits. In the Legion, failure means death, but success means power. [PAWN_pronoun] swore never to fail again.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_c.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_d.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up under the New California Republic, believing in democracy, law, and order. But as the NCR spread, corruption and weakness spread with it. When the Legion came, [PAWN_pronoun] expected death. Instead, [PAWN_pronoun] was given a chance to serve something stronger than the crumbling NCR. Now, with a sword in hand, [PAWN_pronoun] fights against the very nation [PAWN_pronoun] once called home, convinced that Caesar’s way is the only way forward.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_d.title: Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_e.description: The Legion destroyed [PAWN_possessive] town. [PAWN_pronoun] should have died with the rest. Instead, [PAWN_pronoun] was given a choice: submit and fight for Caesar or be wiped away like the rest of [PAWN_possessive] people. With nothing left, [PAWN_pronoun] chose the Legion. At first, it was just survival. But as the years passed, [PAWN_pronoun] began to understand the Legion’s strength. The weak are burned away, and the strong endure. [PAWN_pronoun] will never be weak again.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_e.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_f.description: Some people join the Legion for survival. Some join for loyalty. [PAWN_nameDef] joined because [PAWN_pronoun] loves war. The Legion offered something that no other faction could, unlimited opportunities for battle, slaughter, and conquest. [PAWN_pronoun] fights not for Caesar, not for glory, but simply because it’s what [PAWN_pronoun] does best.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Recruit_f.title: Legion Recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scavenger.description: Unlike the NCR, the Legion couldn’t rely on a strong industrial centre to supply them with enough weapons and ammunition to supply their ever-growing army. [PAWN_nameDef] was a scavenger for the Legion, who’s main task was to scavenge pre-war buildings for weaponry. As the Legion generally was a rather low-tech faction, they favoured weapons that were easy to maintain and repair and rugged enough to keep their functionality in the hazardous wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scavenger.title: Legion Scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scout.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a Scout in Caesar’s Legion. [PAWN_pronoun] job was to explore new areas for the Legion to conquer. [PAWN_nameDef] is well-trained with the weapons of the Legion and always eager to show his prowess in battle against the enemies of the son of Mars.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scout.title: Legion Scout
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scribe.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a scribe in service of Caesar’s Legion. [PAWN_possessive] task was to write done orders, sometimes from Caesar himself, and send them on their way through the Legion’s domain and beyond. Some Legionaries rumoured, that [PAWN_pronoun] secretly wrote poetry, but there never was any proof for these allegations.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Scribe.title: Legion Scribe
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Sentry.description: Being a sentry wasn’t seen as a very honourable task by most legionaries. It was a task mostly left to the less experienced legionaries and recruits. [PAWN_nameDef] wasn’t particularly fond of guard duty, but the horrifying punishments the Legion enacted upon those who neglected their duties were motivation enough to keep [PAWN_objective] focused and obedient.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Sentry.title: Legion Sentry
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Slave.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a slave of Caesar’s Legion. [PAWN_pronoun] was put to backbreaking work by [PAWN_possessive] masters. It was a bleak life full of violence and toil, but it made [PAWN_nameDef] tough and resilient, albeit wary of others.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Slave.title: Legion Slave
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Smith.description: It was expected of each and every Legionary that he was capable of maintaining of his equipment. However, it was [PAWN_nameDef] to craft the equipment at first. [PAWN_pronoun] was a proficient smith, able to craft the Legionaries distinctive armour out of old sport equipment and other salvage. [PAWN_possessive] abilities made [PAWN_objective] popular within the Legion’s encampments, as no warrior, no matter how skilled, can fight for long without good gear.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Smith.title: Legion Smith
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Talented_Hunter.description: Early in [PAWN_possessive] life, [PAWN_nameDef] showed a great talent for hunting. These skills were fostered by the Legion, as food was scarce in the Legion camps and the hides of the beasts [PAWN_pronoun] slayed could be used to craft many useful goods like waterskins, tents and other necessities.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Talented_Hunter.title: Talented Hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Taskmaster.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with ensuring discipline and obedience among the recruits and slaves of Caesar’s Legion. While [PAWN_pronoun] was feared among [PAWN_possessive] subordinates for [PAWN_possessive] brutal methods and high expectations, [PAWN_nameDef] always felt a sense of pride for the younglings [PAWN_pronoun] shaped into Legionaries.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Taskmaster.title: Legion Taskmaster
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Two_Sun_Dweller.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the Arizonian town formerly known as Tucson, which was renamed to Two Sun at some point after the Great War. Two Sun was known as a major trading hub in the southern parts of the American wastelands and an important stop for people travelling to the wastelands of what once was Mexico and vice versa. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a lot about bartering during [PAWN_possessive] time in the sprawling city.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Two_Sun_Dweller.title: Two Sun Dweller
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_a.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has fought beside greatness. From the early days of [PAWN_possessive] service, [PAWN_pronoun] caught the attention of a powerful Centurion, serving as a personal enforcer, executioner, and right-hand warrior. In battle, [PAWN_nameDef] was the one sent to break the enemy’s resolve, to cut down officers, champions, and cowards alike. With [PAWN_possessive] Centurion now dead, [PAWN_pronoun] fights on, not just to honor the fallen, but to one day rise to that same position of power.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_a.title: Legion Veteran
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_b.description: Some battles end in an hour. Others last years. When Caesar ordered a campaign deep into NCR-controlled territory, [PAWN_nameDef] was among those sent on the grueling march. Months without resupply. Constant fighting. Watching entire centuries wiped out. [PAWN_pronoun] survived it all and returned to tell the tale, scarred, hardened, and more devoted than ever. Those who survived became Veterans, forged into warriors beyond pain or fear.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_b.title: Legion Veteran
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_c.description: The battle for Hoover Dam was a test, one that many Legionaries did not survive. But [PAWN_nameDef] was among the few who stood victorious, cutting through wave after wave of NCR defenders. Even when the battle turned against Caesar, [PAWN_pronoun] refused to flee, choosing to hold ground until the last possible moment. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] fights not just for conquest, but for revenge, to see the NCR shattered and Hoover Dam taken once and for all.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_c.title: Legion Veteran
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_d.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up under the New California Republic, believing in democracy, law, and order. But as the NCR spread, corruption and weakness spread with it. When the Legion came, [PAWN_pronoun] expected death. Instead, [PAWN_pronoun] was given a chance to serve something stronger than the crumbling NCR. Now, with a sword in hand, [PAWN_pronoun] fights against the very nation [PAWN_pronoun] once called home, convinced that Caesar’s way is the only way forward.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_d.title: Legion Veteran
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_e.description: The Legion destroyed [PAWN_possessive] town. [PAWN_pronoun] should have died with the rest. Instead, [PAWN_pronoun] was given a choice: submit and fight for Caesar or be wiped away like the rest of [PAWN_possessive] people. With nothing left, [PAWN_pronoun] chose the Legion. At first, it was just survival. But as the years passed, [PAWN_pronoun] began to understand the Legion’s strength. The weak are burned away, and the strong endure. [PAWN_pronoun] will never be weak again.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Veteran_e.title: Legion Veteran
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Alexus_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as Centurion overseeing Legion operations at Techatticup Mine. [PAWN_pronoun] manages slave labor and defends strategic mining positions with tactical precision.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Alexus_Adult.title: Centurion at Techatticup
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Alexus_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was taken into the Legion as a child during tribal assimilation. [PAWN_pronoun] adapted quickly to military discipline and showed tactical aptitude.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Alexus_Child.title: Legion conscript
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Antony_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as the Legion's primary arms merchant at The Fort. [PAWN_pronoun] trades weapons, armor, and supplies with Legion members and approved visitors. [PAWN_nameDef] maintains good relations with Caesar's forces while turning a profit.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Antony_Adult.title: Legion arms dealer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Antony_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a merchant family, learning the value of goods and the art of negotiation. [PAWN_pronoun] could spot quality weapons and armor from an early age.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Antony_Child.title: Trader's apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Canyon_Runner_Adult.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as Centurion overseeing the Legion's slave operations at The Fort. [PAWN_pronoun] manages the capture, breaking, and assignment of slaves with cold efficiency. [PAWN_nameDef] views slaves as resources to be exploited.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Canyon_Runner_Adult.title: Legion Slave Master
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Canyon_Runner_Child.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up navigating dangerous canyons and learning to track and capture prey. These skills would later serve [PAWN_objective] well in a different kind of hunting.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Canyon_Runner_Child.title: Canyon survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Centurion_Severus_Adult.de: [PAWN_nameDef] commands Legion forces at Dry Wells, enforcing Caesar's will with brutal efficiency. [PAWN_pronoun] is ruthless in combat and shows no mercy to enemies or incompetent subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Centurion_Severus_Child.de: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up learning to enforce order through strength. [PAWN_pronoun] believed in harsh discipline and total obedience from an early age.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Cursor_Lucullus_Adult.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a Cursor, a Legion scout and messenger. [PAWN_pronoun] explores ahead of Legion forces, gathering intelligence and relaying orders. [PAWN_nameDef] moves quickly through hostile territory.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Cursor_Lucullus_Child.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was always fast on [PAWN_possessive] feet and quick-minded. [PAWN_pronoun] delivered messages across dangerous terrain with speed and reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Dead_Sea_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commands Legion forces at Camp Nelson with ruthless efficiency. [PAWN_pronoun] is known for brutal tactics including crucifying NCR prisoners. [PAWN_nameDef] enforces discipline through fear and violence.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Dead_Sea_Adult.title: Centurion at Nelson
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Dead_Sea_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a harsh tribal environment where only the strong survived. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that violence and intimidation were the keys to power.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Dead_Sea_Child.title: Brutal tribal youth
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Decanus_Severus_Adult.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] commands a contubernium (squad) at Camp Nelson. [PAWN_pronoun] enforces discipline among legionaries and coordinates small unit tactics. [PAWN_nameDef] aspires to earn promotion through battlefield performance.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Decanus_Severus_Child.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the Legion's training camps. [PAWN_pronoun] learned combat skills and tactical basics, preparing to lead small units.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Gaius_Magnus_Adult.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] leads Legion raids against NCR positions, particularly targeting Camp Forlorn Hope. [PAWN_pronoun] is a skilled tactician who keeps NCR forces under constant pressure through coordinated attacks.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Gaius_Magnus_Adult.title: Centurion at Forlorn Hope
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Gaius_Magnus_Child.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised within the Legion from early childhood. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in combat training and absorbed Legion philosophy completely.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Gaius_Magnus_Child.title: Legion raised warrior
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Karl_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as Decanus at Cottonwood Cove, a Legion river outpost. [PAWN_pronoun] manages ferry operations and oversees security along the Colorado River approach to The Fort.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Karl_Adult.title: Decanus at Cottonwood Cove
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Karl_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a tribe conquered by the Legion. [PAWN_pronoun] proved [PAWN_possessive] worth in combat and was selected for military training.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Karl_Child.title: Tribal warrior youth
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Otho_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] manages the Legion's mongrel war dogs at The Fort. [PAWN_pronoun] breeds, trains, and maintains these vicious animals used for guarding and combat. [PAWN_nameDef] understands his beasts better than most people.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Otho_Adult.title: Legion mongrel master
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Otho_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around dangerous wasteland creatures. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to understand their behavior and train them through a mix of discipline and reward.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Otho_Child.title: Beast handler child
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Picus_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operates as a Frumentarius embedded at Camp McCarran. [PAWN_pronoun] passes as an NCR civilian while gathering intelligence and sabotaging operations. [PAWN_nameDef] must maintain [PAWN_possessive] cover at all costs.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Picus_Adult.title: Deep cover agent
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Picus_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was always watching, always listening. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to gather information and read people's intentions before speaking.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Picus_Child.title: Observant youth
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated as a Frumentarius until [PAWN_possessive] capture by the NCR. Now held at Camp McCarran, [PAWN_pronoun] faces interrogation while maintaining loyalty to Caesar. [PAWN_nameDef] knows too much to give up easily.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Adult.title: Captured spy
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef] learned early that lies and misdirection could be as effective as weapons. [PAWN_pronoun] practiced assuming different personas and hiding [PAWN_possessive] true nature.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Child.title: Deceptive child
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Aurelius_Adult.d: [PAWN_nameDef] earned the rank of Centurion through valor in battle. [PAWN_pronoun] commands a century of legionaries and is responsible for pacifying the Phoenix area. [PAWN_pronoun] is a skilled tactician and respected by [PAWN_possessive] troops for leading from the front.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Aurelius_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in Legion territory and raised according to Caesar's strict code. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in military training and showed natural leadership abilities from an early age.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Caesar_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] founded Caesar's Legion after being captured by the Blackfoot tribe. Using [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of Roman history and tactics, [PAWN_pronoun] united dozens of tribes under one banner. [PAWN_pronoun] is a brilliant strategist and charismatic leader, though [PAWN_pronoun] suffers from a brain tumor that causes periodic weakness.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Caesar_Child.des: Born Edward Sallow, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by the Followers of the Apocalypse after [PAWN_possessive] parents died. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth studying history, linguistics, and philosophy in the Boneyard, developing a sharp intellect and an obsession with ancient Rome.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lanius_Adult.des: Known as the Monster of the East, [PAWN_nameDef] rose to become Caesar's most feared military commander. After personally executing [PAWN_possessive] entire tribe for cowardice, [PAWN_pronoun] joined the Legion and became legendary for [PAWN_possessive] brutality and unstoppable combat prowess. [PAWN_pronoun] leads from the front, breaking enemy lines through sheer violence.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lanius_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Hidebarks tribe in the savage lands east of the Colorado River. As a youth, [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed [PAWN_possessive] tribe's brutal traditions and learned that strength and fear were the only currencies that mattered in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lucius_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] commands Caesar's elite Praetorian Guard. [PAWN_pronoun] is a veteran warrior who has served the Legion for decades, earning [PAWN_possessive] position through unwavering loyalty and battlefield skill. [PAWN_pronoun] is responsible for Caesar's personal safety and the training of the Praetorian Guard.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lucius_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was one of the earliest tribes assimilated into Caesar's Legion as a child. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained in the ways of the Legion from a young age, learning discipline, tactics, and absolute loyalty to Caesar.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vulpes_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] leads the Legion's Frumentarii, the elite intelligence and infiltration corps. Known as "Mr. Fox," [PAWN_pronoun] is a master of espionage, sabotage, and psychological warfare. [PAWN_pronoun] operates behind enemy lines, sowing chaos and gathering intelligence for Caesar's campaigns.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vulpes_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional intelligence and cunning from a young age. When [PAWN_possessive] tribe was absorbed by the Legion, [PAWN_pronoun] was selected for special training due to [PAWN_possessive] quick mind and natural talent for deception.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an armorer for the Enclave, specializing in the maintenance, repair, and distribution of advanced power armor and energy weapons. With extensive knowledge of pre-war military technology, [PAWN_pronoun] was trusted to outfit elite soldiers with the finest equipment available. [PAWN_nameDef] took pride in [PAWN_possessive] work, ensuring every suit of armor and weapon functioned flawlessly. [PAWN_possessive] expertise and dedication made [PAWN_objective] a cornerstone of the Enclave's military strength.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.title: Enclave Armorer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Arsenal_Specialist: The Enclave’s high-tech gear needed a lot of maintenance to remain in pristine condition. [PAWN_nameDef] was an Enclave arsenal specialist. [PAWN_possessive] job was to repair the advanced power armour of the Enclave’s Troopers, as well as their high-tech plasma and laser weapons. There were very few communities in the wasteland that were capable of crafting such marvels of technology and the [PAWN_nameDef] zealously guarded these secrets.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.descript: The Enclave was very concerned with the exposure of their members to the almost omnipresent radiation of the wasteland. As such, they were careful what their members consumed. [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with growing the necessary foodstuffs for the Enclave. While people in the wasteland couldn’t be too picky about what they ate, [PAWN_pronoun] generally preferred to grow corn and other non-mutated crops of the pre-war world, instead of their mutated successors, like tatos.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.title: Enclave Biologist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.descrip: While the Enclave’s bureaucracy was considerably smaller compared to the one of her old-world pendant, it still needed numerous bureaucrats to tend to the copious amounts of paperwork that accumulated over the years. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those faceless paper pushers and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] life in cramped offices and dusty conference rooms. While [PAWN_nameDef], was an efficient and competent clerk, [PAWN_pronoun] was rather solitary.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.title: Enclave Bureaucrat
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Compassionate_Chil: Unusual for a child raised in the Enclave, [PAWN_nameDef] showed compassion and mercy on other creatures, even those deemed lower by fellow Enclave members. These character traits made life within the organisation difficult for [PAWN_objective] and [PAWN_pronoun] distanced [PAWN_objective]self from most others.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Conscripted_Adjuta: The Enclave never was a particularly numerous group and was, consequentially often short on staff. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up within the lower ranks of the Enclave and was conscripted into service at a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] worked as an adjutant for an Enclave officer. [PAWN_possessive] supervisor wasn’t a particularly friendly person, but [PAWN_nameDef] learned a lot about the day-to-day duties of a military officer and remembered these lessons well.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Engineer_Trainee.d: The complex machinery the Enclave depended upon needed near constant supervision and maintenance. This meant that skilled engineers were always needed and children with a knack for machinery, such as [PAWN_nameDef] were put into training in their early youth.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Entitled_Scion.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the highest echelons of Enclave society. [PAWN_pronoun] was used to underlings taking care of [PAWN_possessive] every need and whim, while [PAWN_pronoun] trained and studied for a career in the leading positions of the Enclave.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was a rank-and-file soldier within the Enclave. Of course, rank-and-file in this case meant [PAWN_pronoun] was an excellently trained fighter, equipped with some of the finest equipment of post-war America and instilled with nothing but scorn and disdain for the average wastelander and all other inhabitants of the wasteland, mutated or not.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.title: Enclave Foot Soldier
Enclave Foot Soldier
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Hellfire_Trooper.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was with the Enclave hellfire troopers, an elite group of Enclave soldiers equipped with experimental hellfire power armour and heavy napalm throwers called incinerators. Due to [PAWN_possessive] yearlong service with the hellfire troopers [PAWN_nameDef] developed a rather… unwholesome fascination with fire, especially when it was brought in contact with living beings.
[PAWN_nameDef] once was a regular farmer, but [PAWN_possessive] life changed the day [PAWN_possessive] humble farmstead was visited by a man in a trench coat and his entourage of armoured brutes. It did not take much intimidation to “persuade” [PAWN_nameDef] to serve [PAWN_possessive] country and deliver the produce of the farmstead to a nearby Enclave outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Laboure: Once an ordinary wastelander [PAWN_nameDef], wandered around until that fateful day when [PAWN_pronoun] walked right into an Enclave patrol. The heavily armed soldiers clad in pitch-black power armour told [PAWN_objective] that the country needed [PAWN_possessive] service. [PAWN_nameDef] had no idea what that meant, but before [PAWN_pronoun] could react, [PAWN_pronoun] was knocked unconscious and dragged away, to serve as a labourer for the Enclave, fulfilling all kinds of menial work for [PAWN_possessive] new masters.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Servant: Many tasks were just beneath the higher-ranking members of the Enclave. [PAWN_nameDef] was abducted by an Enclave patrol to handle some of these tasks. [PAWN_pronoun] was not only put to work as a custodian but was also responsible for negotiations with wastelanders in those rare cases, where the Enclave did not resort to violence to achieve her goals as well as supervising the indentured labourers and similar tasks the officers didn’t want to besmirch themselves with.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Junior_Civil_Serva: After finishing basic education [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to serve within the byzantine bureaucracy of the Enclave, which ensured the functionality of the organisation. The institution’s focus on ruthless efficiency made [PAWN_objective] cold and unkind.
Every once in a while, the Enclave would scour the Wasteland in search of new “workers”. While the patrols preferred to abduct adults, they weren’t opposed to capturing children. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those unfortunate kids. While [PAWN_pronoun] was generally looked down upon most other members of the Enclave, it was possible, although unlikely for [PAWN_objective] to rise up to higher ranks within the organisation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Lab_Assistant.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] showed great promise while being educated within the Enclave and was subsequently made a lab assistant. There [PAWN_pronoun] learned much about many scientific fields such as chemistry, physics, and biology from some of the brightest, albeit not very ethical minds of the Wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Levied_Recruit.des: The skills of the Enclave’s soldiers was the result of years of strenuous training under the supervision of remorseless drill sergeants. Due to a shortage of able recruits, [PAWN_nameDef] was levied into service as a child and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] youth in barracks and on training fields. This made [PAWN_objective] a great warrior indeed, but left little time for anything else, since the Enclave did not exactly promote creative thinking within the rank and file.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was an officer of the Enclave department of the army. [PAWN_pronoun] truly believed in the Enclave’s mission to rebuild the USA and was eager to do [PAWN_possessive] part to implement this vision. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a skilled soldier, [PAWN_possessive] true talent lay in motivating [PAWN_possessive] subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.title: Enclave Officer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Peacekeeper_in_Tra: The highly stratified society of the Enclave demanded absolute obedience from its citizenry. As an especially loyal child [PAWN_nameDef] was accepted into the ranks of the Enclave Peacekeeping Force, where [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned how to ensure peace and order, especially within the conscripted masses of forced labourers, usually by means of a cattle prod.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.descript: The Enclave had a number of highly-trained physicians, whose primary task was to tend to important personnel like officers or high-ranking politicians. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those physicians. [PAWN_pronoun] lacked the distinctive contempt most other Enclave members felt for the inhabitants of the wasteland, a character trait that often put [PAWN_objective] at odds with [PAWN_possessive] superiors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.title: Enclave Physician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.descrip: As most people within the Enclave, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to believe that all beings that dwelt in the wasteland were mutated and genetically inferior. [PAWN_pronoun] however, took these lessons more to heart than others and so [PAWN_pronoun] became a politician in the enclave, to advocate for the “cleansing” of the wasteland so that, one day, the last unmutated humans could reclaim the land that is rightfully theirs and finally rebuild the nation that once was.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.title: Enclave Politician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.descr: While the Enclave generally didn’t look favourably upon the other inhabitants of the Wasteland, they had to grudgingly accept that they were useful at times. To keep the wastelanders (mis-)informed about the Enclave’s intents, [PAWN_nameDef] was instructed to write Propaganda material and distribute it in settlements surrounding the Enclave’s outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.title: Enclave Propagandist
Enclave Propagandist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Quartermaster.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a quartermaster for the Enclave, responsible for managing and distributing uniforms, supplies, and essential equipment to soldiers and personnel. Known for [PAWN_possessive] meticulous record-keeping and efficient logistics, [PAWN_pronoun] ensured that every unit was properly outfitted for duty. With an eye for detail and a talent for negotiation, [PAWN_nameDef] became an invaluable asset to the Enclave's supply chain, maintaining the organization's operational readiness even in the harshest conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Secret_Service_Age: Nominally, the secret service is still tasked with the protection of the president of the United States. However, most Enclave presidents used them as elite troops, charged with the most pressing matters of national security. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of this elite troop. [PAWN_pronoun] was a perfectly trained killing machine, with a total lack of empathy only concerned with the fulfilment of the president’s orders. Even other Enclave members shuddered at [PAWN_possessive] cold, calculating personality.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Tesla_Soldier.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a tesla soldier with the Enclave. As the name suggests, these elite troopers are known and feared for their advanced tesla power armour and their prowess with heavy plasma weaponry. Lucky for the inhabitants of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] and the tesla soldiers [PAWN_pronoun] belonged to were a rather rare sight, deployed only against the Enclave’s most stubborn and dangerous enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.description: While most wastelanders were more of a nuisance to the Enclave than an actual threat, there were some culprits that caused more trouble. [PAWN_nameDef] was a warden with the Enclave and [PAWN_possessive] job was to look after the unfortunate prisoners of the Enclave, as well as to extract all important information from them, even if they weren’t in possession of such knowledge. As soon as [PAWN_possessive] superiors thought they gained all useful information from a prisoner, it was up to [PAWN_nameDef] execute them, which [PAWN_pronoun] often did in a grisly manner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.title: Enclave Warden
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.descript: The Enclave was always interested in the mutated wildlife that dwelled in the wasteland. However, their intentions were less based on scientific curiosity and more on the desire to weaponize the horrific beasts roaming the irradiated landscape. [PAWN_nameDef] was a zoologist with the Enclave and conducted cruel experiments on many different beasts to test their suitability for combat, as well as methods to control them. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a respected scientist, [PAWN_pronoun] also showed sadistic tendencies and was avoided by most other Enclave members.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.title: Enclave Zoologist
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Autumn_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to become Colonel and de facto leader of Enclave forces in the Capital Wasteland. Unlike Richardson, [PAWN_pronoun] believed the Enclave should control the wasteland's population rather than exterminate them. [PAWN_possessive] pragmatic approach and tactical brilliance made [PAWN_objective] a formidable commander, though [PAWN_pronoun] still held unwavering loyalty to Enclave supremacy.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Autumn_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] was born on the West Coast but traveled with [PAWN_possessive] father's unit to the Capital Wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up in military camps, learning discipline and combat tactics from an early age. The death of [PAWN_possessive] father instilled in [PAWN_objective] a fierce determination to prove [PAWN_possessive] worth and continue the family legacy.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Curling_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] developed the FEV Curling-13 virus, designed to kill anyone with even trace amounts of wasteland mutation. [PAWN_pronoun] justified this genocide as necessary for humanity's survival, believing only pure humans deserved to inherit Earth. [PAWN_possessive] brilliant but twisted mind created one of the most dangerous bioweapons in post-war history.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Curling_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional aptitude for biology and chemistry from a young age. The Enclave's scientific division nurtured [PAWN_possessive] talents, providing access to pre-war research data and advanced laboratory equipment. [PAWN_pronoun] studied virology and genetic engineering, fascinated by the potential to reshape humanity at the molecular level.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dornan_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] became the Enclave's most feared drill sergeant. [PAWN_pronoun] trained countless soldiers with brutal efficiency, accepting nothing less than perfection. [PAWN_possessive] legendary temper and devastating verbal tirades became infamous throughout Enclave ranks. While [PAWN_pronoun] was despised, the soldiers [PAWN_pronoun] trained were among the finest the Enclave had.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dornan_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up under extremely rigid military discipline on the Oil Rig. [PAWN_possessive] parents were both career soldiers who tolerated no deviation from protocol. This upbringing forged [PAWN_objective] into someone who valued order, discipline, and following procedures above all else. [PAWN_pronoun] had no patience for incompetence or excuses.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] defected to the Enclave, believing they had the resources and willingness to complete Project Purity properly. [PAWN_pronoun] worked on adapting the purifier to the Enclave's needs, though [PAWN_pronoun] was kept in the dark about Colonel Autumn's true plans. [PAWN_possessive] scientific ambition blinded [PAWN_objective] to the Enclave's darker intentions.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Adult.title: Enclave Defector
Defector
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] was originally trained as a scribe in the Brotherhood of Steel. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at advanced physics and engineering, working on Project Purity. However, [PAWN_pronoun] grew frustrated with the Brotherhood's cautious approach to technology and their unwillingness to push boundaries in pursuit of progress.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Child.title: Brotherhood Trainee
Trainee
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Horrigan_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the Secret Service until exposure to FEV transformed [PAWN_objective] into a super mutant. Rather than terminate [PAWN_objective], the Enclave encased [PAWN_objective] in specially modified power armor, creating an unstoppable killing machine. [PAWN_pronoun] became the Enclave's ultimate enforcer, utterly loyal and mercilessly efficient. [PAWN_possessive] humanity was buried beneath layers of augmentation and conditioning.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Horrigan_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] was born abnormally large even as a child. The Enclave saw [PAWN_possessive] size and strength as valuable assets rather than defects. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained from youth to be a weapon, learning to channel [PAWN_possessive] size into devastating combat effectiveness. [PAWN_pronoun] never questioned orders, only executed them.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Manderly_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a field major, coordinating Enclave operations across multiple fronts. [PAWN_pronoun] commanded squads in X-02 power armor and planned strategic strikes against enemy positions. [PAWN_possessive] ability to adapt tactics to changing battlefield conditions earned [PAWN_objective] respect from both superiors and subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Manderly_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] showed talent for strategic thinking and logistics from youth. [PAWN_pronoun] studied pre-war military campaigns and learned to coordinate complex operations. The Enclave trained [PAWN_objective] in both combat leadership and strategic planning, preparing [PAWN_objective] for field command.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Moreau_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] earned [PAWN_possessive] captain's rank through demonstrated combat excellence and tactical leadership. [PAWN_pronoun] commanded power armor squads in frontline operations, proving that skill and determination mattered more than gender. [PAWN_possessive] troops respected [PAWN_objective] for leading from the front and never asking them to do anything [PAWN_pronoun] wouldn't do [PAWN_pronoun]self.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Moreau_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up as a military child, moving between Enclave facilities. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to adapt quickly and became proficient in various combat scenarios. Watching [PAWN_possessive] parents serve with distinction inspired [PAWN_objective] to pursue a military career and prove [PAWN_pronoun] could excel in the male-dominated officer corps.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Richardson_Adult: [PAWN_nameDef] became President of the Enclave, leading the remnants of the United States government. [PAWN_pronoun] championed the FEV Curling-13 project to eradicate all "mutated" life in the wasteland. [PAWN_possessive] unwavering belief in genetic purity made [PAWN_objective] a dangerous ideologue who would stop at nothing to achieve [PAWN_possessive] vision of a cleansed America.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Richardson_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Enclave's political elite on the Poseidon Oil Rig. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up surrounded by pre-war American ideals and the belief in genetic purity. From childhood, [PAWN_pronoun] was groomed for leadership, studying governance, rhetoric, and the Enclave's vision for America's restoration.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vickers_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded Enclave Hellfire trooper units in the Capital Wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] led brutal operations against Brotherhood of Steel positions and wastelander settlements. [PAWN_possessive] tactical acumen and ruthless efficiency made [PAWN_objective] one of Colonel Autumn's most valuable officers. [PAWN_pronoun] wore the experimental Hellfire armor, marking [PAWN_objective] as an elite among elites.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vickers_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was selected for elite officer training from an early age. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in tactical simulations and power armor operations. The Enclave's instructors saw [PAWN_objective] as officer material, grooming [PAWN_objective] for command positions in their most critical operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Whitley_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in Enclave research facilities, helping develop the Hellfire power armor and advanced combat robots. [PAWN_pronoun] became socially isolated, preferring the company of machines to people. [PAWN_possessive] work was brilliant but [PAWN_pronoun] rarely considered the ethical implications of [PAWN_possessive] creations. Eventually, the weight of what [PAWN_pronoun] had helped create began to trouble [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Whitley_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was fascinated by robots and artificial intelligence from childhood. [PAWN_pronoun] spent countless hours studying pre-war robotics manuals and programming guides. The Enclave recognized [PAWN_possessive] talent and provided specialized training in cybernetics and AI systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Actor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] once performed on stage and screen. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] entertains with stories and impersonations of a lost world.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Actor.title: Old World Actor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bartender.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] ran a bar in a half-collapsed building, serving drinks and advice to travelers and locals alike. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to listen, and to break up the occasional brawl.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bartender.title: Wasteland Bartender
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bureaucrat.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] shuffled papers in a government office before the bombs. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] uses [PAWN_possessive] organizational skills to keep settlements running.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bureaucrat.title: Pre-war Bureaucrat
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Caravan_Guard.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years escorting caravans across the wasteland, fending off raiders and mutants. [PAWN_pronoun] is always alert for danger.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Caravan_Guard.title: Caravan Guard
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Chem_Cook.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years brewing chems in hidden labs. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the dangers of addiction and the value of a steady hand.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Chem_Cook.title: Chem Cook
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Entertainer.descript: Once a singer or comedian, [PAWN_nameDef] now entertains wastelanders with tales and songs from a world long gone.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Entertainer.title: Pre-war Entertainer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Hunter.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] stalked the wilds, hunting mutated beasts for food and sport. [PAWN_pronoun] is fierce and knows how to track prey.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Hunter.title: Feral Hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Survivor.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years on the edge of feral madness, surviving by instinct alone. [PAWN_pronoun] is tough, but struggles to relate to others.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Survivor.title: Feral Survivor
Feral Survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Grave_Robber.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living digging up graves and looting the dead. [PAWN_pronoun] is skilled at moving quietly and finding hidden things.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Grave_Robber.title: Grave Robber
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Historian.descriptio: Before the bombs fell, [PAWN_nameDef] was a keeper of knowledge. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] is a living relic, sharing stories of the old world with anyone who will listen.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Historian.title: Pre-war Historian
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mechanic.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fixed cars, robots, and anything else with moving parts before the war. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] keeps battered machines running in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mechanic.title: Old World Mechanic
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mutant_Wrangler.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in capturing and taming mutated creatures for settlements and traders. [PAWN_pronoun] is fearless around beasts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Nurse.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cared for the sick and wounded before the bombs. [PAWN_pronoun] still tends to the injured, using both old and new techniques.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Nurse.title: Old World Nurse
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Chef.descr: Before the war, [PAWN_nameDef] was a renowned chef. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] makes the best of wasteland ingredients to feed survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Chef.title: Old World Chef
Chef
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Cop.descri: Before the war, [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the law. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] keeps order as best [PAWN_pronoun] can in a lawless world.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Cop.title: Old World Cop
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Pre_war_Doctor.descr: Once a respected physician, [PAWN_nameDef] now uses [PAWN_possessive] knowledge to patch up wounds and treat radiation sickness in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Pre_war_Doctor.title: Pre-war Doctor
Doctor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Preacher.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the wastes, spreading hope and faith to those who would listen. [PAWN_pronoun] is a skilled orator and counselor.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Preacher.title: Wasteland Preacher
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Radio_Operator.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years maintaining and operating old-world radio towers, relaying messages across the wastes. [PAWN_pronoun] is skilled with electronics and communication.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Radio_Operator.title: Radio Operator
Radio Op
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Raider_Outcast.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] once ran with a vicious raider gang, but was cast out for being too different. [PAWN_pronoun] is tough, but trust is hard to earn.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Raider_Outcast.title: Raider Outcast
Outcast
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Relic_Hunter.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] scoured ruins for valuable pre-war artifacts, trading them for supplies. [PAWN_pronoun] has a keen eye for hidden treasures.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Relic_Hunter.title: Relic Hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Rot_Farmer.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] tended mutated crops in irradiated soil, growing food others wouldn't dare touch. [PAWN_pronoun] is hardy and knows how to survive on little.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Rot_Farmer.title: Rot Farmer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scavenger.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] survived by picking through ruins and forgotten vaults, always searching for something valuable. Years of scavenging made [PAWN_pronoun] resourceful, but wary of strangers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scavenger.title: Wasteland Scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Artist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] turned junk into art, making sculptures from twisted metal and broken glass. [PAWN_pronoun] sees beauty where others see only ruin.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Artist.title: Scrap Artist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Merchant.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] bought and sold scrap, bartering with travelers and settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the value of everything and the price of trust.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Merchant.title: Scrap Merchant
Merchant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Sculptor.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] welded together art from the ruins, creating beauty from destruction. [PAWN_pronoun] is creative and skilled with tools.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Sculptor.title: Scrap Sculptor
Sculptor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Teacher.description: Once a teacher in a pre-war school, [PAWN_nameDef] now tries to pass on knowledge to the next generation, even if few care to listen.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Teacher.title: Old World Teacher
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Dweller.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] lived for decades in the dark tunnels beneath ruined cities, emerging only when necessary. [PAWN_pronoun] is used to darkness and silence.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Dweller.title: Tunnel Dweller
Tunnel Dweller
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Rat.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] spent decades living in subway tunnels and sewers, avoiding the sun and surface dangers. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at moving unseen and surviving in the dark.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Rat.title: Tunnel Rat
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Janitor.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] kept the vault clean and running, fixing leaks and unclogging pipes. After the bombs, [PAWN_pronoun] just kept working, even as the vault fell apart.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Janitor.title: Vault Janitor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Technician.des: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the vault's systems, keeping lights on and doors sealed. [PAWN_pronoun] is skilled with machines and electronics.
[PAWN_nameDef] protected a secretive cult devoted to the glow, using [PAWN_possessive] strength to keep outsiders at bay and defend sacred sites.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Glowlight_Scou: [PAWN_nameDef] was sent ahead of ghoul groups to scout out safe paths through radioactive wastelands, using [PAWN_possessive] glow as a beacon in the dark.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Irradiated_Hea: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to use [PAWN_possessive] own radioactive touch to heal other ghouls, easing their pain and closing wounds with a strange, glowing energy.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Cultist.de: [PAWN_nameDef] worshipped the glow, preaching to others about the cleansing power of radiation. [PAWN_pronoun] is zealous and persuasive, but sometimes unhinged.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Hermit.des: [PAWN_nameDef] lived alone in a radioactive crater, shunned by others but at peace with the glow. [PAWN_pronoun] is self-sufficient and rarely speaks.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Mystic.des: [PAWN_nameDef] claimed to see visions in the radioactive haze, interpreting omens for fellow ghouls. [PAWN_pronoun] is respected for [PAWN_possessive] insight and strange wisdom.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Outcast.de: Feared even by other ghouls, [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to live on the fringes of society, surviving on whatever [PAWN_pronoun] could scavenge from the most irradiated ruins.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Pilgrim.de: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the world seeking places of great radiation, believing each journey brought [PAWN_pronoun] closer to enlightenment.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Prophet.de: [PAWN_nameDef] claimed to receive visions from the radioactive storms, guiding others with cryptic warnings and prophecies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Shaman.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was revered among ghouls for [PAWN_possessive] ability to withstand and channel radiation. [PAWN_pronoun] guided others through the most irradiated places, believing the glow was a blessing.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Shepherd.d: [PAWN_nameDef] led groups of ghouls through the most dangerous, glowing wastelands, keeping them safe from both radiation and predators.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Warden.des: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded the entrances to highly irradiated zones, warning or driving off those who could not survive the glow. [PAWN_pronoun] is vigilant and intimidating.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Radstorm_Survi: [PAWN_nameDef] survived a catastrophic radstorm that would have killed most. The experience left [PAWN_pronoun] glowing and forever changed, but also strangely invigorated.
[PAWN_nameDef] maintained a shrine deep within a glowing crater, tending to relics and performing rituals for visiting ghouls.
